name: Cicely Davis
subject: Tell Big Tech to stop protecting Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Big Tech censored my video saying it was “Sensitive Material” just because I stated the facts of what Ilhan Omar’s party has done to my community |
---

**Big Tech is CENSORING my video launching my campaign to LIBERATE Minneapolis from the radical control of Ilhan Omar.**
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=870cc8bf10684ccb9858a150ee3b324d&_e=bYNMOxIz4x4Q-45XPIacQTeA0QKTuTKCZv9fusZ6Ky-rzNVgfE-igBirdoKA8adB3BjWdLy8jp3aK4JadwFCNs5HznJ3LzAoOy32GGyCHPvbpm9M0XOY8PYq9QMjmzYu0MVk-yGTK71Dishz3U6Ohv8es_vWLPaM4qt2rUZFr6wsMCAbiRAXNZkbRmC8iTMKeWaLfknTV7gILb_e1cjzgk-0lomQksd_ifNeHpYEZoISeTuZq6Ei5DDSLDJB0kcq6NE2YIEBRTXPb4ha8V3_jHFNpeQ3zDVS40PSAWe-eF4FOj4KPjvWUIPrRXFNinrAJvT7umT0Wy5j5GgtS7RSGda9-0QHUuYcBxahIEC-vvDwixBS6GOonvKPUTHjRwrC_KWxvx7ejEBmzZhnrMcX7EfvVSLKaahIj_VDDwDGemfbGcuc77004DPbVCXKBdoH4vrGqnbLQDraR8HefL1tPA%3D%3D)

This is how liberal Big Tech treats anyone who disagrees with them. This isn’t the first time and, unfortunately, won’t be the last. [**So I need your help to fight against the CENSORSHIP of Big Tech!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=870cc8bf10684ccb9858a150ee3b324d&_e=bYNMOxIz4x4Q-45XPIacQTeA0QKTuTKCZv9fusZ6Ky-rzNVgfE-igBirdoKA8adB3BjWdLy8jp3aK4JadwFCNs5HznJ3LzAoOy32GGyCHPvbpm9M0XOY8PYq9QMjmzYu0MVk-yGTK71Dishz3U6Ohv8es_vWLPaM4qt2rUZFr6wsMCAbiRAXNZkbRmC8iTMKeWaLfknTV7gILb_e1cjzgk-0lomQksd_ifNeHpYEZoISeTuZq6Ei5DDSLDJB0kcqvGgq4MdPzmpqTvKtR9TgZQIpnSFNaT7yet8zLRYJqVuUli0o5N4s1t8urxkZAOIoNQPzsO4iOf0bnWlfwhziQpepTaQK5XC58zVxMhLHGbHQPLu-u5acszjKsM3kwqHe5wrPRrNKbyWW5OYby-uKj702WF6r__d4IMIBsp-b0IfPJ9HGGkBoGagER5vjbo7RFagH23XzMvc1vFMHNBMT0w%3D%3D)

**Right now, Ilhan Omar can go on live television and be anti-Semitic while promoting Black Lives Matter as they commit acts of violence. But, if a Black conservative woman points out the violent statistics in a city that Ilhan Omar is supposed to represent, that’s considered “Sensitive Material” according to Big Tech.**

[** DON’T LET BIG TECH CENSOR A BLACK CONSERVATIVE **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=870cc8bf10684ccb9858a150ee3b324d&_e=bYNMOxIz4x4Q-45XPIacQTeA0QKTuTKCZv9fusZ6Ky-rzNVgfE-igBirdoKA8adB3BjWdLy8jp3aK4JadwFCNs5HznJ3LzAoOy32GGyCHPvbpm9M0XOY8PYq9QMjmzYu0MVk-yGTK71Dishz3U6Ohv8es_vWLPaM4qt2rUZFr6wsMCAbiRAXNZkbRmC8iTMKeWaLfknTV7gILb_e1cjzgk-0lomQksd_ifNeHpYEZoISeTuZq6Ei5DDSLDJB0kcqMUhc0y5oSse0J6wbq31AVKwIPKw2NGlH-jF9il2PoAaHk64swSk2n0GVzklgX22fJLaa5gzWVJTEBjiWPk2TM45eHRhK8jMraxo5RnJ2uiA1cuOEbR9qgzJTiAJv8TtZ50VuYlomUfE9yiLIJILihOMl24kIOZbSB6M0HFfiFXBexrEio5oCG8oxLyCq_3B0eT6kSIa25ZyPqWXHhBaLNw%3D%3D)
We can’t allow Ilhan Omar to spend any more time in Congress trying to be a celebrity, while ignoring the violence and chaos that is destroying cities all over this country.

If you’re serious about making an impact and kicking radicals like Omar and Pelosi out of office, [**then please support my campaign right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=870cc8bf10684ccb9858a150ee3b324d&_e=bYNMOxIz4x4Q-45XPIacQTeA0QKTuTKCZv9fusZ6Ky-rzNVgfE-igBirdoKA8adB3BjWdLy8jp3aK4JadwFCNs5HznJ3LzAoOy32GGyCHPvbpm9M0XOY8PYq9QMjmzYu0MVk-yGTK71Dishz3U6Ohv8es_vWLPaM4qt2rUZFr6wsMCAbiRAXNZkbRmC8iTMKeWaLfknTV7gILb_e1cjzgk-0lomQksd_ifNeHpYEZoISeTuZq6Ei5DDSLDJB0kcq5nWr50-w46unjARo1C30_eLz0ZVM2S2L16A3Kyt80fBLA38Z0IHACkUKzNfy4_16x_u9NbHKnQ6FE2qWNaLS-1NPlC1d3j9vw_KMubnIMLH1iHrw3AGMYD7E1l1Xjb4pQlMGqlPH383tmQV5DiKi4p7uu9RgQE4LzqCJexX9Lmf5AOVjdnzIL-ceRPG4rz4fK82YrGeYADFs1JLSKW5YuA%3D%3D)

The longer we wait to go on the offensive means more time Omar has to build up her war chest. **Don’t give her the chance to keep cheating your fellow Americans out of the American Dream,** [**help me put an end to her reign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=870cc8bf10684ccb9858a150ee3b324d&_e=bYNMOxIz4x4Q-45XPIacQTeA0QKTuTKCZv9fusZ6Ky-rzNVgfE-igBirdoKA8adB3BjWdLy8jp3aK4JadwFCNs5HznJ3LzAoOy32GGyCHPvbpm9M0XOY8PYq9QMjmzYu0MVk-yGTK71Dishz3U6Ohv8es_vWLPaM4qt2rUZFr6wsMCAbiRAXNZkbRmC8iTMKeWaLfknTV7gILb_e1cjzgk-0lomQksd_ifNeHpYEZoISeTuZq6Ei5DDSLDJB0kcqQL86ak4uMuuu4tMNHw5u-QHcSkYQU8rA3h8wCRZHuX8y7wqkeEq77KOcgbfIFVr74qerof8i5DHZ0laDUYsy9TUxJ7BG21nGi2m0TDT37zOGw_mIcnryKcEzopL_e0ZEAOYMKUAtXfFsDO7PRvrcD265Uo7Z58vt5XUUtJHZ9jIUztA5gvuyX1bKK0NbvT6bU_Borl6wYbJSu1EtBM4YnQ%3D%3D)

For America,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=870cc8bf10684ccb9858a150ee3b324d&_e=bYNMOxIz4x4Q-45XPIacQTeA0QKTuTKCZv9fusZ6Ky-rzNVgfE-igBirdoKA8adB3BjWdLy8jp3aK4JadwFCNs5HznJ3LzAoOy32GGyCHPvbpm9M0XOY8PYq9QMjmzYu0MVk-yGTK71Dishz3U6Ohv8es_vWLPaM4qt2rUZFr6wsMCAbiRAXNZkbRmC8iTMKeWaLfknTV7gILb_e1cjzgk-0lomQksd_ifNeHpYEZoISeTuZq6Ei5DDSLDJB0kcqWpAxZmqG8K6uoPwnO23qU43BGFvUP_l8CsHhcvCTpUGSjDo5UDuGcEYzL5-p5Qjb57KnWlQWLVndT7Tf9wTZI135gPla0DOS_nAkZWfuDeO5cXO0ZjoU6GbH33xndWAFj3z7D-R1jChbG9Q12OrXNudkejytDYMS-tpoQX25HuFL-WTRwz8_uPQoG2t3EiGU7nGzsCvxVn_7sRfcWupzwQ%3D%3D)
Cicely Davis

[** DON’T LET BIG TECH CENSOR A BLACK CONSERVATIVE **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=870cc8bf10684ccb9858a150ee3b324d&_e=bYNMOxIz4x4Q-45XPIacQTeA0QKTuTKCZv9fusZ6Ky-rzNVgfE-igBirdoKA8adB3BjWdLy8jp3aK4JadwFCNs5HznJ3LzAoOy32GGyCHPvbpm9M0XOY8PYq9QMjmzYu0MVk-yGTK71Dishz3U6Ohv8es_vWLPaM4qt2rUZFr6wsMCAbiRAXNZkbRmC8iTMKeWaLfknTV7gILb_e1cjzgk-0lomQksd_ifNeHpYEZoISeTuZq6Ei5DDSLDJB0kcqymFiZvfrkiQyDyh5WmteqEXzNW8zWEm-cZBMDuZxDJoJLuOwGPa_fNYATQKVg3LTCyIYzHa67Cs-TWm0QRuyU_rQFkQtGgq2uSN68fGTVXwFGxRrtxMD4EMHVvY7n41VR2w3GIB3QlNyznQ_qxM4ibuTer30OKvW5N3uRGzmXHwaptsjLpBTLOsJSOgcVOBhvn_KurDPt3Wwsf277-whJw%3D%3D)

subject: re: Will you sign the card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca PAC
body:
Help me make Rebecca’s birthday one to remember.
| [](https://links.action-rebeccapac.com/u/click?_t=631205e0f17145509eb8eb9d4e6173c7&_m=3f67cc3b71484c2f8cbd8267c4a95824&_e=-ykImR0N2iBebG2DlZkLSOXMeh_4bL1kpU1K6YrktogrBe-lNKX2wTgBqWviVQPu3yqtaO7TCx7B0y1cwM7x0P0cm42syfiIltSfXAxPBQd6Z4qmRb8xelxFA2CyQzE0NMTBsfrtu8DC-r7yOkdUzVat4rMaYFAA9tzogJKrbrx55e_FPDL2mLEBWqlY_gnhIGRcUHbwekyS9esgFKYw0Ocir3jpKxvhhb7B2RJya7g0vB-SK1zAAJgzFjQd4URp7Rb30Q0s8nno7hKjCet4jEtOUjOLe9jOgARxt6IMCMlFrlW38EDznRLiOAqWXn9C5GZde2jDJKuuCe0E1vet5LRXXBPQfctZtY13ODZV1R74jcRN-uoUzHO_awJJC05PUAhzV1BmFvgeycrzN6kiAKmqMed09s5m33GwGCxt0F8%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Rebecca’s birthday is tomorrow, and our two daughters and I are hoping you can help us make it extra special.
---
_Fighting for Wisconsin families and helping others is Rebecca’s passion. She’s the hardest working person I’ve ever met and, honestly, I don’t know how she does it all._
---
Rebecca is selfless and never wants us to make a fuss over her birthday, but I know it would mean the world to her to see thousands of grassroots friends sign her birthday card this year.
---
_I couldn’t possibly imagine handing her the card without YOUR name on it, Friend._
---
[**So please, add your name before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to ensure it gets on Rebecca’s card before her birthday tomorrow.**](https://links.action-rebeccapac.com/u/click?_t=631205e0f17145509eb8eb9d4e6173c7&_m=3f67cc3b71484c2f8cbd8267c4a95824&_e=-ykImR0N2iBebG2DlZkLSOXMeh_4bL1kpU1K6YrktogrBe-lNKX2wTgBqWviVQPu3yqtaO7TCx7B0y1cwM7x0P0cm42syfiIltSfXAxPBQd6Z4qmRb8xelxFA2CyQzE0NMTBsfrtu8DC-r7yOkdUzVat4rMaYFAA9tzogJKrbrx55e_FPDL2mLEBWqlY_gnhIGRcUHbwekyS9esgFKYw0M8hW2Q6u_v3SEjrA8sOmJfpL4wUfZPIy_8yYE7ZALGiAddeOOP01jO91T865miwv-SRAxqPBt2V5CzEdVLnQM5k7Pg-OypoPnfhenl6OAnFpU7wZ5hlJqsPg2uDfCzsYcRx8HkK4YQP5IjXJjxRSVQfd8E5DRm_zD3hLj4y3LY6wh3I2N1KItbZJ9lZ_2reoVm2ZDl3YF-XgWfNFTgESqI%3D)
---

name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: Gavin Newsom has failed California, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
We can't begin to save California without FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58090727:JIS9VelNT:m:1:3253819041:53B27CE1FC0E3136F8367ACC67099A62:r)

---
Peter,

To say Gavin Newsom has failed California is a HUGE understatement.

Gavin Newsom has...
Destroyed...
Betrayed...
Ruined...
Endangered...
Repressed...
Impoverished California.

This is why we're fighting to recall Gavin Newsom, [**and we need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58090727:JIS9VelNT:m:1:3253819041:53B27CE1FC0E3136F8367ACC67099A62:r)

We can't begin to save California and restore it to the place where people once again come to achieve the American Dream without **FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom.**

[**Will you join us and help recall Gavin Newsom on September 14th by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or even more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58090727:JIS9VelNT:m:1:3253819041:53B27CE1FC0E3136F8367ACC67099A62:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER
RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58090727:JIS9VelNT:m:1:3253819041:53B27CE1FC0E3136F8367ACC67099A62:r)
Under Gavin Newsom, people and businesses are fleeing California in droves. Those who choose to stay face rampant crime & homelessness, a broken education system, high cost of living and high taxes.

_What has happened to California is both heartbreaking and infuriating_

**It 's not too late to save our state, but first we need to get rid of the man responsible for its demise.**

Recalling Gavin Newsom is question #1 on the September 14th recall election ballot, and it's the first step to getting California back on the path to prosperity, opportunity and exceptionalism.

[**Will you contribute $25, $50, $100 or even more now to help us rally Californians who are ready to save California and recall failed governor Gavin Newsom?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58090727:JIS9VelNT:m:1:3253819041:53B27CE1FC0E3136F8367ACC67099A62:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder
Recall Newsom
Ballot Committee

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER
RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58090727:JIS9VelNT:m:1:3253819041:53B27CE1FC0E3136F8367ACC67099A62:r)
| "Gavin Newsom has failed California. He's raised our taxes, closed our schools, put millions out of work, killed any number of small businesses, released thousands of criminals into our communities, and allowed the homeless to take over our streets. It's time to hold Gavin Newsom accountable for the nightmare he's made of California. Join me in voting YES to recall Gavin Newsom on September 14th." - LARRY ELDER

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Let me say this as plainly as I can: Gov. DeSantis is bad for Florida’s economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
He's too focused on hyper-partisan policies and his own political ambitions.
|
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?refcode=20210807_f_1_fl&amount=25)

| | Friend, I'll tell it to you straight: Gov. Ron DeSantis's hyper-partisan policies and single-minded focus on his own ambitions are _**hurting**_ our economy.

**[As governor, I won't put politics over people -- and I won't _ever_ put myself before Florida. If that's the sort of leader you want in Tallahassee, please consider a quick donation to my campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?&refcode=20210807_f_1_fl&amount=25)** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210807_f_1_fl&amount=5)
[DONATE $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210807_f_1_fl&amount=25)
[DONATE $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210807_f_1_fl&amount=50)
[DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210807_f_1_fl&amount=100)
[OTHER](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?refcode=20210807_f_1_fl)

When Floridians needed a helping hand to get through the pandemic, Gov. DeSantis _**opposed**_ stimulus checks, tax cuts, and funding for local governments.

His actions are also _**damaging**_ our tourism industry, the lifeblood of Florida's economy:
* He's ignoring the "red tide" algae bloom that's driving off visitors to our coasts.
* He's waging war on the cruise ship industry, which supports tens of thousands of jobs across our state.
* And he's pretending there isn't a Delta variant surge, even as Florida accounts for over **A FIFTH** of all national COVID-19 cases.

Let me say this as plainly as I can: Gov. DeSantis is bad for our economy. Instead of focusing on _**any**_ of these issues, he's fixated on running for president. He's wading into hyper-partisan fights by signing transgender sports bans and voter suppression bills.

**Gov. DeSantis is thinking about presidents, polls, and primaries -- and do you know who he 's not thinking about? **

Floridians.

**[That's wrong in my book, and it always will be. I'm running for governor of this great state to put people over politics, and I need your help to do it. If you can, pitch in to my campaign. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/f2BSd6neSIJIgMNYUD9Ccg==/efQYUidHy2H-Z38-KZwgQg==?refcode=20210807_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

Thanks and God bless,
Charlie Crist

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Letitcia James' investigation into Andrew Cuomo has shown that Cuomo harassed, lied to, and hurt at least 11 women. Andrew Cuomo is a predator, and he must resign. Our grassroots progressive movement is turning up the heat to kick him out because Democrats have to stand for justice \-- and that means Andrew Cuomo has to go. We're not the only ones calling on Andrew Cuomo to resign. So far, President Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Cuomo's own state party chair have called on him to resign because they know they can't stand by as predators cling to power. But we need to hear from principled Democrats like you. We need to know that when Andrew Cuomo's political machine comes after us because we refuse to stay quiet about his pattern of abuse and harassment, that you'll have our backs. We know principled Democrats like you would never stand by anyone, regardless of party, after it was revealed that they sexually harassed and intimidated others. But we have to ask: **Should Andrew Cuomo be removed from office for sexually harassing women?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33666364/299579694/663826464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3MWMyNjk2LTgzZjctZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X1mvC-bpiPwyI1ni1emY9FoQ3n5DUY2mf7NeG6Mm8ig=&emci=067fafac-02f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a71c2696-83f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33666371/299579699/663826464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3MWMyNjk2LTgzZjctZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X1mvC-bpiPwyI1ni1emY9FoQ3n5DUY2mf7NeG6Mm8ig=&emci=067fafac-02f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a71c2696-83f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

Democrats must live up to the values we say we live by, especially when members of our own party violate those values.

Thank you for taking our survey to show you won't stand idly by while Cuomo tries to get away with his untenable behavior.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33666378/299579700/663826464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3MWMyNjk2LTgzZjctZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X1mvC-bpiPwyI1ni1emY9FoQ3n5DUY2mf7NeG6Mm8ig=&emci=067fafac-02f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a71c2696-83f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

subject: Youtube Censors Banned Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58092638:J0nOHeloN:m:1:3253819041:344969650AE6FA5782EE3656338F31A3:r) | |
---
Peter,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58092638:J0nOHeloN:m:1:3253819041:344969650AE6FA5782EE3656338F31A3:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58092638:J0nOHeloN:m:1:3253819041:344969650AE6FA5782EE3656338F31A3:r)
**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: disturbing Roe v. Wade development
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,
There's been a disturbing new development in the GOP's attack on women's reproductive freedom:
The Mississippi Attorney General, who will soon defend the state's extreme abortion ban before the Supreme Court, just _explicitly_ argued that the Court should overturn _Roe v. Wade_ - making it clear that this case isn't just about Mississippi's disastrous law, but in fact about the future of reproductive freedom for women across the country.
Worse still, nearly 230 members of Congress - including Mitch McConnell - sent a brief to the Supreme Court also urging that _Roe v. Wade_ be overturned.
The sustained, coordinated attack by the Republican Party on women's reproductive healthcare has made it all the way up to the nation's highest court - and if we don't act now, the GOP could succeed in taking us back to the dark days when every woman's personal decision about when to have a child was controlled by the government.
**That 's why I am urgently asking you to help me pass my bill, the Women's Health Protection Act, which would guarantee a woman's right to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions at the federal level -- no matter what the courts or right-wing state lawmakers try to do.**
**With attacks on women 's reproductive health at an all-time high, I'm counting on 545 supporters to sign my petition to pass the Women's Health Protection Act. Even if you've spoken out before, the urgency of this moment demands you speak up again. Can I count on your signature before my 11:59 p.m. deadline?**
**[Sign on now to urge Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act so we can defend women's reproductive health.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1059-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1059-su-nd)****
[ SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1059-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1059-su-nd)
Thank you,
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Mon, Jul 26, 2021
Subject: New extreme anti-abortion law (need your response)
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3MRPmocVfFYNVn1vXM9pXH1V6sZUfkjB&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Texas is ground zero for extreme restrictions on women's reproductive healthcare - and a new law passed by the state GOP has an offensive twist on Republicans' outright assault on reproductive freedoms.
Texas Republicans have not only passed an unconstitutional ban on abortion beyond six weeks of pregnancy - before most women can know or even be aware that they are pregnant - but have also opened the door for anyone in the _entire country_ to sue Texas health clinics, doctors, and just about anyone who helps a woman exercise her constitutional reproductive rights.
The U.S. Supreme Court will soon rule on Mississippi's abortion ban, which could effectively overturn Roe v. Wade. Add to that threat Texas' extremist provisions, and we are faced with yet further reason for Congress to act urgently. My bill, the Women's Health Protection Act, would protect women's health through access to safe and legal abortion - no matter what extremist legislators try to do and no matter how the Supreme Court rules. #Healthcare no matter what.
**[In light of what's happening in Texas and around the country, I'm counting on 875 people to sign my petition urging Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act so we can defend reproductive health. Even if you've spoken out before, there is renewed urgency to speak out again and again and again. Please, sign on now.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1059-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1059-su-nd)**
[ SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1059-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1059-su-nd)
As we've seen with Republican-led attacks to restrict voting rights, when extremist laws take hold in one state, they can spread like wildfire to others. Texas' sickening new maneuver will be a model for anti-choice legislators across the country, and that's why action at the federal level to block these extremist laws is so necessary.
If we do nothing, Texas is only the beginning. Our country could return to dark days where every single woman's personal decision about when to have a child is controlled by the government - back to the days where abortion care was driven underground and made unsafe.
I will fight with everything I have to prevent that from happening, but I need you to help me pass this vital legislation through Congress. **[Please, can I count on you to sign my petition now urging Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act? I'm counting on 875 team members to sign on before midnight to protect abortion access.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1059-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1059-su-nd)**
[ SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-dobbs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1059-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1059-su-nd)
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1059-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=aHS2Hjv8Pq754EcNkgNBquNehQrCD84g&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: Team Cooper
subject: They’re not being subtle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We’ll keep fighting for as long as it takes. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33673927/299593314/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDMxOGNmMS04YmY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdYk6SrS5EKs_IUNitPJa4dR_SM50vVsDUeXG7Bfy_o=&emci=ddbf68e5-fbf5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=00318cf1-8bf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Republican legislative leaders have just one strategy to maintain and expand their influence over North Carolina’s government**— and they’re not exactly being subtle about it.** Rather than promoting policies that will actually help the American people, the GOP plans to win elections by _picking_ which voters get to have a say. **Voter suppression is the name of their game.** Here in North Carolina, Senate Republicans passed a bill _restricting_ mail-in voting, and communities of color and young North Carolinians — _folks who on average are more likely to vote for Democrats_ — will be the most affected. **[Peter, Roy will do everything he can to defend mail-in voting, but he needs us with him. Sign our petition right now to say you support vote by mail in North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33673929/299593315/1516460377?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights_080721_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDMxOGNmMS04YmY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdYk6SrS5EKs_IUNitPJa4dR_SM50vVsDUeXG7Bfy_o=&emci=ddbf68e5-fbf5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=00318cf1-8bf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)** The fight against voter suppression is nothing new to North Carolina. Courageous activists have spent decades working to secure access to the ballot box for _all_ of us. **And we’ll keep fighting for as long as it takes.** Far-right politicians are relying on lies about election fraud to justify restricting access to the ballot box. **We need to tell them loud and clear that we see what they’re doing — and we won’t stand for it.** **[Sign our petition right now to join Roy and stand up to the GOP’s voter suppression tactics>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33673930/299593316/1516460377?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights_080721_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDMxOGNmMS04YmY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdYk6SrS5EKs_IUNitPJa4dR_SM50vVsDUeXG7Bfy_o=&emci=ddbf68e5-fbf5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=00318cf1-8bf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33673931/299593317/1516460377?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights_080721_button1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDMxOGNmMS04YmY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdYk6SrS5EKs_IUNitPJa4dR_SM50vVsDUeXG7Bfy_o=&emci=ddbf68e5-fbf5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=00318cf1-8bf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)

name: Stefanie Sass
subject: Where’s Ron?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

As COVID cases have surged in Florida, Ron DeSantis has been jet-setting around the country raising money.

From Texas to Utah to Michigan earlier this week to Vegas next week — he’s been absent when Floridians need him most. In the meantime, Nikki has stepped up to fill the void, providing transparency, support, and guidance during this crisis.

While DeSantis is off raising money, and Nikki is doing the work. We deserve better than a Governor who is absent in times of crisis. If you agree, please click here to chip in now and help us defeat DeSantis next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-absent-nf]

It’s no wonder that President Biden asked “Governor who?” when asked about DeSantis’ pandemic response. Ron has played politics, gone to war with the Biden administration, and left the state during this crisis.

We need a Governor who is 100% committed to Floridians. Nikki will be that Governor and always step up for us.

Your help is absolutely critical to stopping DeSantis—especially since he continues to rake in millions from Republicans nationwide. Click here to chip in now and help us win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-absent-nf]

Thanks for being with us in this critical fight.

Stefanie Sass
Finance Director

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We have a big opportunity to gain a huge amount of momentum
#

Here's the situation:
Yesterday a brand new candidate entered our race. Everyone's been talking about it.
And with all the buzz around our race now, we have a big opportunity to gain a huge amount of momentum — but only if we act quickly.
So I asked the team to put together a plan to double our outreach over the next week, but here's the catch:
**We've got to raise $10,000 over the next 48 hours to make it happen.**
So I'm reaching out to you, hoping this team will come through for Malcolm like you've done countless times before.
[Can you make a $3 donation today to help us double our outreach while folks are buzzing about our race? It's so important for us to take advantage of this moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33675074/299598556/-353695395?refcode2=0f02222c-90f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210807-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjAyMjIyYy05MGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzTcbWrumPFM_Fdev5JPVMVFCHVmJ8Oo4I7BEQDlSbs=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33675075/299598557/-353695395?refcode2=0f02222c-90f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210807-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjAyMjIyYy05MGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzTcbWrumPFM_Fdev5JPVMVFCHVmJ8Oo4I7BEQDlSbs=)**
No matter who enters this race, I know Malcolm is THE champion Pennsylvania's working families need fighting for us in Washington.
So thank you in advance for anything you’re able to give today. And thanks for always being there for Team Malcolm when we need it most.
It's an honor to be in this fight alongside you.
In solidarity,
Vanessa
Vanessa Clifford
Campaign Manager
Malcolm Kenyatta for U.S. Senate

subject: Rules for thee, not for me
body:
---
| | | | | | |

|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I continued to call out the hypocrisy of the left and their anti-science COVID mandates. I also continued to highlight the crisis on our southern border caused by Joe Biden and expose the lies of Texas Democrats who fled to D.C. to block election integrity measures.
As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001twCqYvhaDXY0TgWDAOOIEWS1BaYJlyel3ztlZQCPSxRiQOkMr3G2-n90C6Z42kyCBsMVVSZgyXnTrtJ-dCQpo-eeU07vxlArNFYOj2sPr8iM4kb0EGzFAwoA_6ev1sTYqhaC3jNKx0XBm5WJm7FHVHLeAWI7BftJLkY9ejAPuXA=&c=uQxMXWzVoU6kJH86IGSO0h7vYSdqrpYiwR690DJTUIRBKFxh9H8FCQ==&ch=fWjntNhb57UzoKjK82P9QJWfGnASzwNldAGv_09qwby0S-Kk7DE8Sg==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001twCqYvhaDXY0TgWDAOOIEWS1BaYJlyel3ztlZQCPSxRiQOkMr3G2-qmlAxsPH0zO44DmU9MrkKtJVku6pouBF13LlKl6RnaLf_v2QUm-ierFlnt4a7Z6-KXEnbJ-XAiePcQDcvorPVPD8aPu_gmxirZOyUFdRmS5&c=uQxMXWzVoU6kJH86IGSO0h7vYSdqrpYiwR690DJTUIRBKFxh9H8FCQ==&ch=fWjntNhb57UzoKjK82P9QJWfGnASzwNldAGv_09qwby0S-Kk7DE8Sg==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001twCqYvhaDXY0TgWDAOOIEWS1BaYJlyel3ztlZQCPSxRiQOkMr3G2-qmlAxsPH0zOwqwuwN4OGlrwUA8_IqJ_LcTcn2ecfRXgDL5gSOcHuUdG3aw9ZiXQHvxqZApS5zaz4Xcm2Vy89aA7kn0bdNN5LNnDa4PmvS-NyV3iMnEW1SM=&c=uQxMXWzVoU6kJH86IGSO0h7vYSdqrpYiwR690DJTUIRBKFxh9H8FCQ==&ch=fWjntNhb57UzoKjK82P9QJWfGnASzwNldAGv_09qwby0S-Kk7DE8Sg==).
Now, here's your brief.
---
| | |
---
| DEMOCRATS ACTUALLY DO WANT TO DEFUND THE POLICE...WHILE THEY HAVE PRIVATE SECURITY
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001twCqYvhaDXY0TgWDAOOIEWS1BaYJlyel3ztlZQCPSxRiQOkMr3G2-oG5EDnWTknX0dqf13J0efGLEWNOq1_-wy1TqzcNJpy0ccv6mOxCUwUiM-XbqxXpxFHX3COb3S83Yyke6fD5AXnbRrCOxWrQN_JydB9pkMdtk75Eg3GFR9ZWWYG9KYlOpc_6n0KTNEyGGbNdFpot0jskpd5Dr29ccg==&c=uQxMXWzVoU6kJH86IGSO0h7vYSdqrpYiwR690DJTUIRBKFxh9H8FCQ==&ch=fWjntNhb57UzoKjK82P9QJWfGnASzwNldAGv_09qwby0S-Kk7DE8Sg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001twCqYvhaDXY0TgWDAOOIEWS1BaYJlyel3ztlZQCPSxRiQOkMr3G2-oG5EDnWTknX0dqf13J0efGLEWNOq1_-wy1TqzcNJpy0ccv6mOxCUwUiM-XbqxXpxFHX3COb3S83Yyke6fD5AXnbRrCOxWrQN_JydB9pkMdtk75Eg3GFR9ZWWYG9KYlOpc_6n0KTNEyGGbNdFpot0jskpd5Dr29ccg==&c=uQxMXWzVoU6kJH86IGSO0h7vYSdqrpYiwR690DJTUIRBKFxh9H8FCQ==&ch=fWjntNhb57UzoKjK82P9QJWfGnASzwNldAGv_09qwby0S-Kk7DE8Sg==)
We have to do away with this notion that the Democrats aren't a radical party. They are a radical party.
Case in point: Rep. Cori Bush, who represents St. Louis, Missouri, one of the most dangerous cities in America.
People there need policing more than ever, with 109 homicides this year already. You have a 1 in 51 chance of being a victim of a crime in St. Louis.
Yet Cori Bush is openly declaring on the steps of the US Capitol that our police departments should be defunded. Despite the fact that she spends hundreds of thousands of dollars on her own private security.
And she isn't a fringe activist, she is a popular and high profile member of Congress. And this isn't just some radical talking point. It's happening in cities across the country.
[Donate. Help me fight back.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001twCqYvhaDXY0TgWDAOOIEWS1BaYJlyel3ztlZQCPSxRiQOkMr3G2-qFZ-Pe6L6djTvu7zJ2VFjLOsvoJTptBgAAQ0diaddj-IfJ4mSxqAv_g7_Tvx_fHU9QZehoVogNR6eayw0ZH288NIkyhTyEuA-ZKoSznTXiZZGiUfwOMW4urLtG7bncUHr5uekC1yHkSaJ7Nw9tIg50UlVGGoxbk8mpGRgOS-vyhiSObzlH4PuvpmiWzXtxdwSsPn4zY-OAumufpA71NVFZFrxW3zQEhUDfVhqR_DObtWIIe_JNXM5bQ-lT5yijjT-T4SuQo5Dgb&c=uQxMXWzVoU6kJH86IGSO0h7vYSdqrpYiwR690DJTUIRBKFxh9H8FCQ==&ch=fWjntNhb57UzoKjK82P9QJWfGnASzwNldAGv_09qwby0S-Kk7DE8Sg==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I continued to call out the hypocrisy of the left and their anti-science COVID mandates. I also continued to highlight the crisis on our southern border caused by Joe Biden and expose the lies of Texas Democrats who fled to D.C. to block election integrity measures. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | DEMOCRATS ACTUALLY DO WANT TO DEFUND THE POLICE...WHILE THEY HAVE PRIVATE SECURITY | == | == We have to do away with this notion that the Democrats aren't a radical party. They are a radical party. Case in point: Rep. Cori Bush, who represents St. Louis, Missouri, one of the most dangerous cities in America. People there need policing more than ever, with 109 homicides this year already. You have a 1 in 51 chance of being a victim of a crime in St. Louis. Yet Cori Bush is openly declaring on the steps of the US Capitol that our police departments should be defunded. Despite the fact that she spends hundreds of thousands of dollars on her own private security. And she isn't a fringe activist, she is a popular and high profile member of Congress. And this isn't just some radical talking point. It's happening in cities across the country. == | | | | == | | | | RULES FOR THEE, NOT FOR ME | == | == Your kids have to wear a mask in school. The CDC is even telling you to wear a mask IN YOUR HOME... even if you are vaccinated. This anti-science BS from the Biden Administration has to stop - I'm fighting back. == What's worse? The tyrannical leftists imposing these mandates are ignoring their own orders. The Mayor of DC was caught maskless at an indoor wedding hours after imposing new mask mandates in our nation's capital. Speaker Pelosi kept her mask off at a Capitol Hill reception after threatening to fine or jail Republicans for not wearing a mask in the House. And Barack Obama was planning to hold a 500 PERSON birthday party at his Martha's Vineyard mansion... before being shamed into canceling his party. For Democrats it's simple: Rules for thee, not for me. Stop the hypocrisy. Stop the anti-science mandates and lockdowns. Stop telling Americans how to live their lives. That's my message. == | | | == | | | | BIDEN'S BORDER CRISIS | == | == Joe Biden let 210,000 illegal immigrants into our country last month at the southern border. That's the highest monthly total in more than 20 years. Here's Biden's border crisis by the numbers: AT LEAST 50,000 illegal immigrants released into our communities 210,000 caught at our border just last month 1 MILLION caught so far this year. This is out of control. | | | == | While Biden is forcing you to wear a mask and threatening to lock you in your homes because of COVID, he's left the door wide-open to COVID infected illegal immigrants. Now we know that illegal immigrants are infecting our American communities in Texas, where hospital beds are filling up because of Biden's open border policies. The sovereignty of our country and the safety of our communities is at stake. That's why I'm fighting back - holding Joe Biden accountable for his open border policies. But I can't do it alone. I need your help. Can I count on you? == | | | | THE FEW. THE PROUD. THE TEXAS DEMOCRATS. | == | == Texas Democrats have had a tough few weeks of sacrifice and hardship. They've had to skip work to fly on a party jet to hang out with Nancy Pelosi. Then, they got caught lying about the Texas election integrity bills. Then they infected the Speaker's office and White House with COVID and forced DC to reinstate another mask mandate. They can't catch a break. So, you can't blame them when they want to take a little vacation from their vacation. And now they're off to Portugal to enjoy the beach and kick their feet up for a bit. == Remember the care packages they asked for? Well now, we're going to have to send them to Portugal instead of D.C. They still need more supplies to go along with their sewing kits and hairspray. So let's send them a care package of our own. == ✅ Limes for their 6 case of Corona ✅ Crenshaw koozies for their Miller Lite ✅ Guide to the U.S. Constitution - Kindergarten Edition ✅ "Liar Liar" the movie ✅ "Dumb and Dumber - Trip to Capitol Hill" the movie ✅ "Snakes on a Plane" the movie ✅ "Euro Trip" the movie | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS FOX NEWS: == DAILY WIRE: == WSJ: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | By providing your phone number, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (ckq.io/49500) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Team Crenshaw to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. | | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Vaccine Mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter --
Just a short time ago, Democrats kicked me
off my committees and even tried to expel me from Congress (three
times)!
And when I refused to wear a mask in the
Halls of Congress Nancy Pelosi threatened me with thousands of
dollars in legal fines.
She even sent me a warning letter with a list
of demands!
I refused to cave and that letter went
straight through the paper shredder.
Now, I'm pushing back even harder by suing
Pelosi!

HELP MTG SUE PELOSI - EMERGENCY DONATE
17.76 NOW
Unless you stand up right now, the Democrats,
the Fake News Media and the Silicon Valley Cartel will go even
further and try and clamp down on American Patriots.
Trump supporters will be purged from social
media. . .
Mask and vaccine mandates and nationwide
lockdowns will be forced on you and I. . .
And Democrats will have used the China Virus
to take over our federal elections.
But you can help me slam the brakes on their
socialist agenda.
Rush your emergency donation of 17.76 to
help me SUE PELOSI right away!

The Democrats led by Nancy Pelosi, AOC and
the Jihad Squad have painted big red bullseyes on the backs of
American Patriots.
Why?
Because we want to Impeach Biden and Fire
Fauci. . .
Because we oppose the Democrat takeover of
our elections. . .
And because we want to END the nationwide
lockdowns and mask mandates.
If you agree, will you please rush an
emergency donation of 17.76 right away to help me SUE PELOSI?
I'll keep you updated.
Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

This is starting to feel a lot like 2016. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGrFj9wFEhrCrOIEhtzo6AWg1fOEGLPJOm61iW9GF6d0QW7dbboqkPzoMgS_0neQvCpAtDySnxqVY5iTQrW0hy5dx4m-KTkD7zQxdqnskwsSOuyoCZfJZE2T-HFx62YKbDE4lLQ7CBwHr26UIfZvWU0UbAGdyZrJVMCqZVsEuf-GJVBlajQ2B_pWTAgpi8FukQiXAGlDV4hBFZVZXxjED2ycDN8rGmw7vfdid7esK2ZIINSLiBHRfnwrtJNm2NaeDmLiDwr5Mb2GlpZCd0-gF6qGTgxbhwaUMcR4CEJGIvvon/3e9/vm3syco_Sra9G28cvx1bTQ/h0/LTqRBmhtlJsUaabhu4-pEDeZb1TUd9o7bTjQCyRRdUQ) Derek, This is incredibly important, so I wanted to personally reach out. **My midnight deadline is just hours away,** and I’m still short. I'm hoping you can help us make up the gap before it's too late, but first I'll explain why reaching this goal is so critical.

Mitch McConnell and the GOP will stop at nothing to flip the Senate. They only need _one_ seat to do it, and with CNN naming me one the most vulnerable Democratic senators, Nevada is one of their top targets. Now, McConnell's handpicked candidate (a Trump-supporting extremist who election forecasters say _could win_) is _this close_ to entering the race against me.

The GOP and outside spending groups have _already_ spent nearly $1 million to defeat me. This is starting to feel a lot like 2016, when nearly _$50 million_ was spent to buy this seat. I managed to win by a slim two-point margin, and here's what that tough race taught me: **your grassroots support makes a critical difference.**

**That's why I'm urgently asking for your help before tonight's midnight deadline, Derek. This is our chance to show the GOP that our team has what it takes to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate._Please, will you split a donation between my team and Common Good VA?_**

**[Split a donation $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA before the midnight deadline to meet this critical goal, protect Nevada's Senate seat, and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGrFj9wFEhrCrOIEhtzo6AWg4wj6_p3H7tri8AOWOucwAYaouCA_MXJKrxum1OB9PlG16JU-Zq8U5u-h-uOGdIb8wkFd7fcYd0DTTwX_Dk8DV_wA20AkDKgXmc7AUkHV5rggtxtS0sEuaP4ky8GYzzmvJk52D9QSpFwE8CHzSJyo3xe0AKyVAxeZDLqIb4vsc4qoX0gixtHTjoPNoyKSnA52ucmejdyPx5MZ1FvSFkBRqNVgxnbUJJTWAaGVCzbzlH3Cdc_KtnLUEo8GZvxW30pxtfwVriZNhdVN1yZlsZ9PK/3e9/vm3syco_Sra9G28cvx1bTQ/h1/rNLhTz4OyEEPldzSOwGNVNfVY5A0naRzTVezQF0He3o)**

I can't thank you enough for helping us defend the Senate, Nevada, and our country. We can build back better thanks to dedicated grassroots supporters like you.

_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

Catherine

**P.S. I really mean it when I say this grassroots team – including you – has the power to make or break this race.[With Senate control on the line, any amount you can donate to my campaign and Common Good VA before midnight will make a critical difference. Please, rush $10, $20 or whatever you can spare to win in Nevada and defend our Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGrFj9wFEhrCrOIEhtzo6AWj5SjPwyhR49w0ZLfGQHGsH5ojoIhzYAL55aio4-jp14X7qrLyDAGO4ta5jvwlWmLeSxySgy9pTerxQhFnpfA-y95Zh_vfEdq9Z8WrLTRegZLLG5rhyg4ZTCJCa75g9T06drLOuydv0cHuTojJlu3l4BWzRSsH1u3XHDsLEtwOJTvnddSp6NxXAcZjwD-jTOSqNpUO5UaXBXapv_rZEQzlsLtpMmm1P_XP5_wMTFCqIwyquKnutCV0wl8kwMaF1WwSZrosiQNpm0L0-SBj-j3wO/3e9/vm3syco_Sra9G28cvx1bTQ/h2/afUOIE4CgB1xpl6MJ0-zT1evrgORgbGxOf5xv8TtBME)**

Friends, In Congress, I’ve worked to make life better for Arizonans: I’ve fought to secure jobs, strengthen the economy, protect Social Security and Medicare, and protect our natural resources. [_**If you’re on board to help our campaign for Arizona, can you chip in $5 today? **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33679667/299618615/-789744066?refcode=em_fr_2021.08.07_b1_CTOH_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGZmZmY0MS05ZWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbPMAkW_2tqkss5Y-_WjCN_-X6x9Hu_KKHdNkoulhDs=) | ********[Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33679668/299618616/-789744066?refcode=em_fr_2021.08.07_b1_CTOH_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGZmZmY0MS05ZWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbPMAkW_2tqkss5Y-_WjCN_-X6x9Hu_KKHdNkoulhDs=)********
---

The truth is, I never expected to be here in Congress. I have served my community for decades, and after I retired, I was inspired to run -- first for the state legislature, then for Congress.

Today, I remain dedicated to serving Arizona in ways that reflect our values: through collaboration and dedication. Every accomplishment I’ve had in Congress was made possible by our community. I hope to continue serving Arizona, but I can’t do it alone.

[_**Friends, will you chip in $5 or more towards my reelection campaign so I can continue serving Arizonans in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33679669/299618617/-1009387278?refcode=em_fr_2021.08.07_b1_CTOH_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGZmZmY0MS05ZWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LbPMAkW_2tqkss5Y-_WjCN_-X6x9Hu_KKHdNkoulhDs=)

I am grateful for your support.

Congressman Tom O'Halleran

****_Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today._**

clean_body: = Friends, In Congress, I’ve worked to make life better for Arizonans: I’ve fought to secure jobs, strengthen the economy, protect Social Security and Medicare, and protect our natural resources. = | ******=**** The truth is, I never expected to be here in Congress. I have served my community for decades, and after I retired, I was inspired to run -- first for the state legislature, then for Congress. Today, I remain dedicated to serving Arizona in ways that reflect our values: through collaboration and dedication. Every accomplishment I’ve had in Congress was made possible by our community. I hope to continue serving Arizona, but I can’t do it alone. = I am grateful for your support. Congressman Tom O'Halleran Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

While a white supremacist mob stormed the Capitol building on January 6, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy reportedly spoke with Donald Trump on the phone. During their conversation, Trump allegedly indicated he would not call off the insurrectionists. While a white supremacist mob stormed the Capitol building on January 6, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy reportedly spoke with Donald Trump on the phone. During their conversation, Trump allegedly indicated he would not call off the insurrectionists.

We need to know the details of their conversation in order to understand the role Trump played in the insurrection. But when asked if he would comply with a subpoena, McCarthy simply laughed.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Sign on to support investing in America's infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I have been working hard with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to craft the bipartisan infrastructure package that just advanced in the Senate. This legislative deal will make historic investments in rebuilding our highways and bridges -- and go even further by expanding access to high-speed internet and helping to prepare our infrastructure for impacts of the climate crisis.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33680970/299623352/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjk1ZTQ0YS1hMWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aemolsmri_RQvKad3HKCe4qQ5XQ3w50tQtsGhx6Iezs=&emci=9a5bf481-fff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f295e44a-a1f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I have been working hard with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to craft the bipartisan infrastructure package that just advanced in the Senate. This legislative deal will make historic investments in rebuilding our highways and bridges -- and go even further by expanding access to high-speed internet and helping to prepare our infrastructure for impacts of the climate crisis. **_[Will you join our efforts, Derek? Add your name to call on Congress to pass this crucial, bipartisan infrastructure deal and send it to President Biden’s desk right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33680971/299623353/-782744015?ms=mw_em_210806_1&refcode=mw_em_210806_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjk1ZTQ0YS1hMWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aemolsmri_RQvKad3HKCe4qQ5XQ3w50tQtsGhx6Iezs=&emci=9a5bf481-fff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f295e44a-a1f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** The infrastructure deal will help communities all over the country, and Virginia is no exception. From the revitalization of the D.C. Metro system to the expansion of rural broadband, this bill is a job-creator and an investment in an economy that works for every Virginian. It’s taken months of hard work to get to this point -- _and now we’re almost across the finish line._ This is proof partisanship has not paralyzed our government and our democracy can still work. **_[Sign the petition now to support this historic investment in America’s infrastructure.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33680972/299623354/-782744015?ms=mw_em_210806_1&refcode=mw_em_210806_1&refcode=mw_em_210720_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjk1ZTQ0YS1hMWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aemolsmri_RQvKad3HKCe4qQ5XQ3w50tQtsGhx6Iezs=&emci=9a5bf481-fff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f295e44a-a1f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** Thanks, Mark Warner **[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33680973/299623355/-782744015?ms=mw_em_210806_1&refcode=mw_em_210806_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjk1ZTQ0YS1hMWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aemolsmri_RQvKad3HKCe4qQ5XQ3w50tQtsGhx6Iezs=&emci=9a5bf481-fff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f295e44a-a1f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)**

Terry’s opponent isn’t just proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement; he supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. He was even caught on tape saying that he would hide his extreme views on banning abortion and defunding Planned Parenthood from the voters of Virginia.

_Derek, here’s the deal: Terry must win._

Terry is a champion for reproductive rights and the freedom to vote. As governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive, and forward-looking states in the country.

This is not just about electing Terry; it’s also about sending a message to the entire country that candidates who oppose reproductive rights and voting rights -- and who spread Donald Trump’s big lie -- will lose.

subject: We agree with AG Garland, Congress must protect voters rights now.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=080721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=080721]

Dear Friend,

Yesterday was the 56th anniversary of the passing of the historic Voting Rights Act. President Lyndon B. Johnson, who signed it into law, described it as “one of the most monumental laws in the entire history of American freedom."

Protecting participatory democracy is at the heart of our organization's work. That's why Keystone Progress Education Fund joins U.S. Attorney General Garland who called on Congress in The Washington Post to act today to protect and expand the power of Americans' right to vote.

Many of us take not just our fundamental right to vote, but the ease in which we vote, for granted. Right now, laws are being proposed and passed in states around the country to restrict voting access for many, targeting people of color, those with disabilities, the oldest, and newest voters.

At the Keystone Progress Education Fund, we are working at a grassroots level to bolster voter protection through workshops, outreach, mobilization, and other efforts to empower and inform Americans of their rights.

This is such an urgent issue. Please donate today to help us in our truly critical efforts.

DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=080721&amount=15.00]

body:
Liberal Rep. Cori Bush has a message for Americans: "Suck it up!" | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/suck-it-up?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

Rep. Cori Bush (D-Squad) would like a word with you.

As you may have heard, Cori Bush is the woke socialist leading the Democrats’ push to **DEFUND THE POLICE**. But SURPRISE-SURPRISE, campaign finance reports reveal that Bush spends $200,000 per year on _**personal security**_ for herself.

When asked about why she should be protected from violent criminals, but police departments should be defunded, Bush was outraged:

_“I have too much work to do. There are too many people that need help right now for me to allow that. So if I end up spending $200,000, if I spend ten more dollars on it, you know what, I get to be here to do the work,_**SO SUCK IT UP!**_ And defunding the police has to happen.”_

Did you get all that? Cori Bush says __**SHE**__ needs to be safe because she’s a Democrat member of Congress. But __**YOU**__ don’t because you’re not. So “SUCK IT UP!”

[**STAND UP TO CORI BUSH AND THE SQUAD AND SUPPORT THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS TODAY!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=6026ac6ffb&e=b2c16e6198)

This is what the Left really believes. All their talk about democracy and equality and unity is hog slop. Their only agenda is their own power and privilege – and they don’t care who gets hurt.

Don’t like their violent, humanitarian crisis on the border? The million illegal immigrants they have welcomed into our country just this year?

_**Suck it up!**_

Don’t like their Wuhan Lab Covid-19 cover-up?

_**Suck it up!**_

Don’t like that Democrats have defunded police departments and the murder rate has shot up 40% over the last two years?

_**Suck it up!**_

They are not going to stop. Not Cori Bush or Joe Biden or Nancy Pelosi or Alexandria Ocasio Cortez.

[**We have to stop them.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=a94a1f7086&e=b2c16e6198)

House Freedom Fund was created to defend and expand the conservative House Freedom Caucus. We’re up against the media, woke corporations, and against the liberal elites _**in both parties**_.

All we have on our side is the truth... and you.

[**Click here to help HFF take on the Left and the GOP Establishment to fight for America's future!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=1c13ee5969&e=b2c16e6198)

With one transaction, you can make a split contribution directly to members of the House Freedom Caucus like Jim Jordan (R-OH), Lauren Boebert (R-CO), Andy Biggs (R-AZ), Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA), Scott Perry (R-PA), Yvette Herrell (R-NM), and more.

**This is the team of strong, principled patriotic conservatives in the House that's fighting for our future.**

[**Please join help us stop the liberals like Cori Bush by supporting the House Freedom Caucus today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=21de094cb2&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for being part of our team and for doing so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

subject: Building a stronger, fairer Washington State
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
While Senator Patty Murray is fighting for our families in the other Washington, the Washington State Democratic Party is on the ground leading the fight to build a stronger, fairer Washington state by electing more Democrats up and down the ballot.
#
Peter,
While Senator Patty Murray is fighting for our families in the other Washington, the Washington State Democratic Party is on the ground leading the fight to build a stronger, fairer Washington state by electing more Democrats up and down the ballot.
The next elections will determine how we come back from this pandemic and economic crisis for decades to come. We have Democrats to elect and reelect up and down the ballot to make sure that we level the playing field for working families, address the climate crisis, and so much more. We can’t come up short.
**[If you want to help build a stronger and fairer Washington state in 2022 and beyond, will you split a $5 contribution to the Washington State Democratic Party and Patty Murray right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33683698/299632489/395579398?refcode=pm_em_210807_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQzYjU3NC1hYmY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ApEDLaDWoxs6VztO5p2Z4ErI9UXZnnDHs9LklKUymLs=)**
The Washington State Democratic Party is working harder than ever to mobilize organizers, volunteers, and activists in every corner of the state to stand up for our values and elect Democrats at every level of government. And in the U.S. Senate, Patty Murray is pushing for climate action, a national paid leave program, affordable child care, and so much more.
Peter, it’s going to take a grassroots movement -- but we can win the fight for our future.
**[Pitch in $5 or anything you can to join the fight to build a bluer Washington state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33683699/299632492/395579398?refcode=pm_em_210807_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQzYjU3NC1hYmY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ApEDLaDWoxs6VztO5p2Z4ErI9UXZnnDHs9LklKUymLs=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33683700/299632494/395579398?refcode=pm_em_210807_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQzYjU3NC1hYmY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ApEDLaDWoxs6VztO5p2Z4ErI9UXZnnDHs9LklKUymLs=)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: This is *not* the most conventional email I have ever written to you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Allow me to speak my truth.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210807-2223-header&t=1&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)
I'm coming to you today to personally ask if you'll [**chip in your first $5 to our campaign.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27144?refcode=em20210807-2223&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc) Before I get to that, I'd like to share something with you that I'll admit is a bit unconventional:
**I'm about to tell you why NOT to vote for me.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27144?refcode=em20210807-2223&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)
I know this isn't exactly your typical politician's stump speech, but please allow me to speak my truth:
No disrespect – although it may be perceived that way – but if Senators Manchin or Sinema are your ideal Senators, then I am *not* your candidate.
If you are looking for a candidate that had to "evolve" on core issues like the $15 minimum wage, then don't vote for me.
If you want a candidate that has outdated views on marijuana, then you and I might have to agree to disagree.
If what you think our democracy needs in this pivotal moment is a candidate who's going to get compliments from Mitch McConnell and his sedition-curious GOP, then I am quite simply not your guy.
Here's the thing, Peter: Right now, some Democrats in the Senate are choosing to stand in the way of bold, transformative, and once-in-a-lifetime legislation. Policies that have the power to lift millions of working people out of poverty, and that actually deliver on President Biden's agenda for American families.
It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of this country.
**Peter, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in my campaign.**
[**So, if you're still in my corner after reading this note, then I must ask: Will you chip in anything you can today to support our grassroots campaign? I can't get to the Senate on my own — I'm relying on all of yinz to have my back as we fight together to flip this seat blue.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27144?refcode=em20210807-2223&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27144?refcode=em20210807-2223&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)**
If you give me your vote now, then you’ll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back and fight for you when I am in Washington.
Thank you for everything, Peter.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I know my campaign and I come to you often to ask for your support, and here's the honest reason why: **With more candidates jumping into this race each day, we're gearing up for one of the most competitive — and most expensive — races in Pennsylvania's history.** I've refused to accept a cent of corporate PAC money, so I'm relying on folks like you. [**Will you chip in your first $5 or more to our campaign if you're committed to flipping this seat blue in 2022?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27144?refcode=em20210807-2223&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210807-2223-footer&t=25&refcode2=2223_434096_2NZrQc&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2223%2E434096%2E2NZrQc)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Cancel student debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Yesterday, President Biden announced that he will extend the pause on federal student debt repayment — which was slated to expire in less than eight weeks — until January 31, 2022.
**I, along with my progressive colleagues in the House and Senate, had been pushing the President to extend the pause on student loan repayment, and I’m glad that he heeded our calls.**
But we can’t stop there. The next step is for the President to cancel student debt. This is a big ask, so I’ll need your support:
[**Please add your name here to join me in urging President Biden to #CancelStudentDebt.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33684006/299633352/1688145158?refcode2=3ba1743d-adf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210807-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmExNzQzZC1hZGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkCXTXVXxiDtqCNMjQmN-K0JDqYG9ySPNMPO_DawGyw=&emci=39a1743d-adf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3ba1743d-adf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)

These young people are unable to save money to provide for themselves, start families, purchase homes, or simply prepare for a rainy day — and that’s only gotten worse due to the economic fallout of the COVID-19 pandemic.
Prior to the pandemic, it was tough enough to repay student loans. When you adjust for inflation, wages have been stagnant for decades as the cost of a four-year college degree has skyrocketed over the same time period.

clean_body: Yesterday, President Biden announced that he will extend the pause on federal student debt repayment — which was slated to expire in less than eight weeks — until January 31, 2022. I, along with my progressive colleagues in the House and Senate, had been pushing the President to extend the pause on student loan repayment, and I’m glad that he heeded our calls. But we can’t stop there. The next step is for the President to cancel student debt. This is a big ask, so I’ll need your support: In New York’s 17th District alone, thousands of young people have been forced to move back in with their parents or take second jobs to pay off appreciating student loan debt. These young people are unable to save money to provide for themselves, start families, purchase homes, or simply prepare for a rainy day — and that’s only gotten worse due to the economic fallout of the COVID-19 pandemic. Prior to the pandemic, it was tough enough to repay student loans. When you adjust for inflation, wages have been stagnant for decades as the cost of a four-year college degree has skyrocketed over the same time period. President Biden has the opportunity to free tens of millions of Americans from this burden, but — just as we did with the eviction moratorium and the pause on student loan repayment — we need to put pressure on the White House to make sure it gets done. So I’m asking you to join me: This past week has taught us that making our voices heard yields results. Let’s keep going until we’ve cancelled student debt and made college tuition-free moving forward. Thank you for making your voice heard, Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Hi friend,

Jeff recently wrapped up his _Fighting for Pennsylvania Bus Tour_ , and we want to make sure you didn’t miss out on the major highlights from his trip.

Fighting for Pennsylvania Tour Recap:

**✅****3,700****Miles Traveled**
**✅****67****Counties Visited**
**✅****12****Days**
**✅****1****Fighter—Jeff Bartos**

And he’s just getting started — _[**check out Jeff’s recap video of the Fighting for Pennsylvania Tour Now >>**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=dc2666c15d1e4ea9bbac7a07064d1376&_e=r0KqXwAp5GvpB_7wFWaD9rPX2sKZ5PLmw3YOrsAtvSCqr3pUxaTfd0nij2LktLUU16dx4jyrencHi8oy8Y5DzkkU6x8PNiO67ByD2Moxzf99TtlasexT5aRBmYyWkrZTqp--sp1EmJYxsS1ntRSfYdAg0yVulGD_D7fPwPeAR2jstPGdUXHh3zzeKeR8Yx8lenYoAButvAFtLcfjtPsWPodS81gO7vHgm25o5nNcxyIyx7nK-UqmhJijjWoWdG0jNMGKv-6zJmlZCqNtVp7SKhqAlY72KuVy8fdEGEnfdzPnMqoipHAXoqAffrtexPlDUATX36ijp0Bx0mVj_jagaUcktQA5BwVp6H-OgE47VFSYWaI--RkqUYHDY8PHuVbrcOHWr-74O4fNbqKpQgwCa3dzhVMvjhYVMH6YHqI91hBFyTST934G2nCscZ8-3aaGwMjyzFdJv-Ph4fDm_YbGfMvtfhwnzsWs6egj2CFbAcu9ReeN7_3tcQZFwJVLEcP4)_

|
---
Jeff made the rounds at County Fairs across PA and met with our proud men and women of law enforcement.

**Jeff will fight the Defund the Police Movement and always Back the Blue!**

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=dc2666c15d1e4ea9bbac7a07064d1376&_e=r0KqXwAp5GvpB_7wFWaD9rPX2sKZ5PLmw3YOrsAtvSCqr3pUxaTfd0nij2LktLUU16dx4jyrencHi8oy8Y5DzkkU6x8PNiO67ByD2Moxzf99TtlasexT5aRBmYyWkrZTqp--sp1EmJYxsS1ntRSfYdAg0yVulGD_D7fPwPeAR2jstPGdUXHh3zzeKeR8Yx8lenYoAButvAFtLcfjtPsWPodS81gO7vHgm25o5nNcxyIyx7nK-UqmhJijjWoWdG0jNMGKv-6zJmlZCqNtVp7SKhqAlY72KuVy8fdEGEnfdzNEYTbyzqQNKozWMNO_zfTXrYbaWSYF5z5RIcPxAPU5Mzn20jDStK9JHNLJ_7E7KSejnliCUnKfa7mCwAx_XPklwtN8f3zf0cMu0Ub4Igr3HfWlSOjwbHJKnaRj7cOjTeuDxyjjkfe2Xf3iKLycy53KddbUnOLxNZ-3P2YnKRyRL6sMnTeHIfARHMKRZXT-SWIl5k9vp5RZJuWfqbImZv4-)

|

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=dc2666c15d1e4ea9bbac7a07064d1376&_e=r0KqXwAp5GvpB_7wFWaD9rPX2sKZ5PLmw3YOrsAtvSCqr3pUxaTfd0nij2LktLUU16dx4jyrencHi8oy8Y5DzkkU6x8PNiO67ByD2Moxzf99TtlasexT5aRBmYyWkrZTqp--sp1EmJYxsS1ntRSfYdAg0yVulGD_D7fPwPeAR2jstPGdUXHh3zzeKeR8Yx8lenYoAButvAFtLcfjtPsWPodS81gO7vHgm25o5nNcxyIyx7nK-UqmhJijjWoWdG0jNMGKv-6zJmlZCqNtVp7SKhqAlY72KuVy8fdEGEnfdzPMAkmBWSA2ovr-CnPvDjg-HpP0Sfue3ziHle2GOVkxf_X4z8iJjNzrAEk4oLqrCWNdZGilUENop0WO5A7bj7_Zj6MQQgxeM92pFUzZYJpd9bSGFwlAV-kHBTJrN9OUTwDh7OF8OCbgWlBlcb719CN3QIBQBc7Rhi1VsUmKy1YdJaf2mQ8BIKDu1Tj1CDBc6442mdlc1UM0WBKLJnD7hxO8)

In Monroe county, Jeff met with tons of parents concerned with the indoctrination happening in our schools and the climate of intolerance on our college campuses.

**We must fight this indoctrination and restore education!**
|
---
Unfortunately, the trip wasn’t all positive. Jeff saw firsthand the devastating effects of the Biden Labor Crisis in every corner of the commonwealth.

Many small businesses in every county are struggling to stay afloat.
We have to do better.

**That’s why Jeff is Fighting For Pennsylvania!**

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=dc2666c15d1e4ea9bbac7a07064d1376&_e=r0KqXwAp5GvpB_7wFWaD9rPX2sKZ5PLmw3YOrsAtvSCqr3pUxaTfd0nij2LktLUU16dx4jyrencHi8oy8Y5DzkkU6x8PNiO67ByD2Moxzf99TtlasexT5aRBmYyWkrZTqp--sp1EmJYxsS1ntRSfYdAg0yVulGD_D7fPwPeAR2jstPGdUXHh3zzeKeR8Yx8lenYoAButvAFtLcfjtPsWPodS81gO7vHgm25o5nNcxyIyx7nK-UqmhJijjWoWdG0jNMGKv-6zJmlZCqNtVp7SKhqAlY72KuVy8fdEGEnfdzOvSZNimt0CGnnGneTQmYEkmyC4oX-ix-BOWMvMmQJ4UU6gF7BJj9gkIzDsU8brpcHopjdYvwR-dpP4IaqAm_vNKjl9r4nN_rpeRHAXqPeL3OCgJiBNS6WayTM-M0yGqVKPGSdXLSr0UdCp0mdYBc0Px1CUULFSTrWTabARwCUthpx6slxC9wyNxCUydMQyuS6khf6a0JmXeP292BBqjWPT)

|
---
Jeff found it a privilege to meet face to face, listen to his fellow Pennsylvanians, and share his vision for our state and our nation.

**We can’t wait to build the strongest grassroots movement in America with you and send Jeff to the Senate. **

Thank you,
Team Bartos

**_P.S. Want to support our campaign even further?_**___[**_You can make a donation at this secure link today!_**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=dc2666c15d1e4ea9bbac7a07064d1376&_e=r0KqXwAp5GvpB_7wFWaD9rPX2sKZ5PLmw3YOrsAtvSCqr3pUxaTfd0nij2LktLUU16dx4jyrencHi8oy8Y5DzkkU6x8PNiO67ByD2Moxzf99TtlasexT5aRBmYyWkrZTqp--sp1EmJYxsS1ntRSfYdAg0yVulGD_D7fPwPeAR2jstPGdUXHh3zzeKeR8Yx8lenYoAButvAFtLcfjtPsWPodS81gO7vHgm25o5nNcxyIyx7nK-UqmhJijjWoWdG0jNMGKv-6zJmlZCqNtVp7SKhqAlY72KuVy8fdEGEnfdzP54vbD7IK5j8RdRpNw4p3TBZ0YOY6ACHEZlUmxGtHle6RhaEgl6rdELbypTpocuBNuJ2n-UK0wc6n8FFeBDF-4SHsyInb6l2DAzUXNzgH3VhZVhwe9Gu_Z9yQ2f_FOOQ_KpUKc46KjyvwMMBCAmsClDwqTtYyH1MrMxItPD9domHITdDCpV9pp7Of2308ZvhW7sjmbTULRdKz9vGruuUWi)_
