name: Larry Klayman
subject: Home raided at 5 am . . .
body:
Over twenty federal agents assembled before dawn outside the home of my client.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Freedom Watch.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og) Over twenty federal agents assembled before dawn outside the home of my client.

Outfitted in tactical gear and prepared for war, **the FBI agents raided his home and handcuffed him, and two families in the home, in front of two terrified children aged 3 and 7. They would not let him speak with a lawyer, when he asked if he could. And they seized all of his cell phones and computers which are needed to earn a living.**

My client, Siaka Massaquoi, is a conservative black activist and an actor in Hollywood.

On January 6th, he was peacefully protesting at the Capitol which was his First Amendment right.

Now, he's been labeled as a "domestic terrorist" by the media, Nancy Pelosi's evil Democrats and the Biden-Harris regime as part their power grab to acquire even more, that is total, power - and they're using the U.S. Department of Justice, my once proud alma mater, and its FBI as a their "secret police" to do it.

That's why I've filed a Class Action Lawsuit against FBI Director Christopher Wray, the involved special agents and the FBI as a whole for deploying Gestapo tactics against Siaka and other innocent Americans.

[**Help me stop them today by donating to our lawsuit.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)
Under the Biden-Harris regime , the socialist stooges of the radical left, the FBI has been ordered to go after those persons and entities that will stand up to, protest or even criticize their tyranny and what has become a near total leftist takeover of our beloved nation.

And January 6th has given them the excuse to kick in the doors of any American they can themselves define as an "extremist". Usually, the targets are so called "white domestic terrorists", meaning white people in general. But my brave client Siaka Massquoi breaks this mold. As a conservative black person - all blacks are supposed to be leftist and anti-Trump - Siaka is a conservative and pro-Trump. Thus, under the Biden-Harris regime he is a bad example and must be destroyed.

To date, nearly 800 persons have been arrested and nearly 600 have been charged as a result of their alleged participation in the Capitol protests - **but they won 't stop there. To make matters worse corrupt federal judges - the lackeys of the establishments of both political parties - are generally not granting bail, and sending even peaceful protesters to federal prison to await their trial. The outrageous reason; President Trump is still spewing the so called "Big Lie" and he will incite violence again by these peaceful protesters. Some of these corrupt judges have even told the Biden Justice Department to increase the criminal charges to felonies - and many were so charged - predicting that if the peaceful protesters are held to to misdemeanor convictions, there will be more January 6ths. WHAT A CROCK OF EXPLETIVE DELETED!**

While Biden's Justice Department is dropping nearly all cases against violent Antifa and Black Lives Matter terrorists who destroyed Portland, they're gearing up to kick in the doors and terrorize many American patriots who believe in Liberty.

[**Back our class action lawsuit here.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)
My client, Siaka, was lucky. I've told him that.

Most younger Americans don't recall when Vicki Weaver and her 14-year-old son, Sammy, were shot in cold blood by federal agents.

**They weren 't watching live in 1993 as that building in Waco was ignited by the federal government, murdering 76 men, women and children.**

**And, as the lawyer of Cliven Bundy, I am sure that you remember how his family was assaulted and surrounded by federal government sharpshooters on the Bundy Ranch, and then falsely prosecuted, when he stood up to federal government tyranny under the Obama-Biden regime. Thank God that we finally got the indictment dismissed, but only after Cliven and his sons were left to rot in federal prison for almost two years, when it was disclosed at the eventual trial that FBI and Bureau of Land Managers lied on the witness stand, with the complicity of the federal government DOJ prosecutors. Some BLM agents even had a "kill list" on the heads of the Bundys hanging in their offices.**

I remember it! You remember it!

And it's clear to me that if we don't stop the FBI and the Biden Justice Department now, **their actions will trigger counter-violence and ignite a bloody revolt, something which January 6, was not! WE NEED TO DO ALL WE AS AMERICANS CAN PEACEFULLY AND LEGALLY TO PREVENT THIS!**

[**Help me stop them now.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)

The FBI has been hijacked and turned into Biden's and Harris's own "personal Gestapo," as the stooges of the Biden and Harris regime.

The FBI, this once noble and necessary agency, and the Biden Justice Department have been turned into a terrifying para-military squad that kicks in your door before dawn that can take you away in front of your children.

**Sadly they have been turned into the new American Gestapo of what has also become the beginning of a Fourth Reich, right here in our country!**

And it's our obligation to use Constitutional law to stop them!

[**Join me and fighting back today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)

With Gratitude,

Yours in Freedom and Liberty

Larry Klayman, Esq
Chairman and General Counsel
Freedom Watch

P.S. I took on the Clinton Administration and Janet Reno's Justice Department countless times as the head of Judicial Watch. Reno was ruthless, but what I'm seeing build now will pale in comparison. [**Help fund our Class Action lawsuit against the FBI and stop the use of Gestapo tactics against American patriots. Remember that I am the only lawyer ever to have a president found liable for committing a crime. This occurred with Slick Willy Clinton and it 's about the happen again with those who would terrorize us and abridge our freedoms under the Biden-Harris regime.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZtTqS8EiiiOZ763l4763w6YxwA/892b763scfTTXIhLM5AUb1u3og)

We encourage you to. | Patriot, Over twenty federal agents assembled before dawn outside the home of my client. Outfitted in tactical gear and prepared for war, the FBI agents raided his home and handcuffed him, and two families in the home, in front of two terrified children aged 3 and 7. They would not let him speak with a lawyer, when he asked if he could. And they seized all of his cell phones and computers which are needed to earn a living. My client, Siaka Massaquoi, is a conservative black activist and an actor in Hollywood. On January 6th, he was peacefully protesting at the Capitol which was his First Amendment right. Now, he's been labeled as a "domestic terrorist" by the media, Nancy Pelosi's evil Democrats and the Biden-Harris regime as part their power grab to acquire even more, that is total, power - and they're using the U.S. Department of Justice, my once proud alma mater, and its FBI as a their "secret police" to do it. That's why I've filed a Class Action Lawsuit against FBI Director Christopher Wray, the involved special agents and the FBI as a whole for deploying Gestapo tactics against Siaka and other innocent Americans. Under the Biden-Harris regime , the socialist stooges of the radical left, the FBI has been ordered to go after those persons and entities that will stand up to, protest or even criticize their tyranny and what has become a near total leftist takeover of our beloved nation. And January 6th has given them the excuse to kick in the doors of any American they can themselves define as an "extremist". Usually, the targets are so called "white domestic terrorists", meaning white people in general. But my brave client Siaka Massquoi breaks this mold. As a conservative black person - all blacks are supposed to be leftist and anti-Trump - Siaka is a conservative and pro-Trump. Thus, under the Biden-Harris regime he is a bad example and must be destroyed. To date, nearly 800 persons have been arrested and nearly 600 have been charged as a result of their alleged participation in the Capitol protests - but they won 't stop there. To make matters worse corrupt federal judges - the lackeys of the establishments of both political parties - are generally not granting bail, and sending even peaceful protesters to federal prison to await their trial. The outrageous reason; President Trump is still spewing the so called "Big Lie" and he will incite violence again by these peaceful protesters. Some of these corrupt judges have even told the Biden Justice Department to increase the criminal charges to felonies - and many were so charged - predicting that if the peaceful protesters are held to to misdemeanor convictions, there will be more January 6ths. WHAT A CROCK OF EXPLETIVE DELETED! While Biden's Justice Department is dropping nearly all cases against violent Antifa and Black Lives Matter terrorists who destroyed Portland, they're gearing up to kick in the doors and terrorize many American patriots who believe in Liberty. My client, Siaka, was lucky. I've told him that. Most younger Americans don't recall when Vicki Weaver and her 14-year-old son, Sammy, were shot in cold blood by federal agents. They weren 't watching live in 1993 as that building in Waco was ignited by the federal government, murdering 76 men, women and children. And, as the lawyer of Cliven Bundy, I am sure that you remember how his family was assaulted and surrounded by federal government sharpshooters on the Bundy Ranch, and then falsely prosecuted, when he stood up to federal government tyranny under the Obama-Biden regime. Thank God that we finally got the indictment dismissed, but only after Cliven and his sons were left to rot in federal prison for almost two years, when it was disclosed at the eventual trial that FBI and Bureau of Land Managers lied on the witness stand, with the complicity of the federal government DOJ prosecutors. Some BLM agents even had a "kill list" on the heads of the Bundys hanging in their offices. I remember it! You remember it! And it's clear to me that if we don't stop the FBI and the Biden Justice Department now, their actions will trigger counter-violence and ignite a bloody revolt, something which January 6, was not! WE NEED TO DO ALL WE AS AMERICANS CAN PEACEFULLY AND LEGALLY TO PREVENT THIS! The FBI has been hijacked and turned into Biden's and Harris's own "personal Gestapo," as the stooges of the Biden and Harris regime. The FBI, this once noble and necessary agency, and the Biden Justice Department have been turned into a terrifying para-military squad that kicks in your door before dawn that can take you away in front of your children. Sadly they have been turned into the new American Gestapo of what has also become the beginning of a Fourth Reich, right here in our country! And it's our obligation to use Constitutional law to stop them! With Gratitude, Yours in Freedom and Liberty Larry Klayman, Esq Chairman and General Counsel Freedom Watch P.S. I took on the Clinton Administration and Janet Reno's Justice Department countless times as the head of Judicial Watch. Reno was ruthless, but what I'm seeing build now will pale in comparison. | On July 29, Greater Georgia [filed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Sdcv_MncGpWhsYPCKtR2AI6K7EUUeFOIQkKjbu9IYCxO5ZJlQjl0bc0ZRD-BT9BYQypdVDqQEnKcPSa9HciU1K-VuOZcDcFC1H1hGSIJTGdWbWa2qSAI7jQtuprGEyEE_DyTM8rk6uVzhYYazLtuixewFFR-ccmE-J6pd7BYrjaRgTlJBrHsnWxjuBSozGtwIK18dMIyxV-V1buhk0-s98FTbHGzgrzu04VBLEzjyU=&c=prrYEQxnp9S3YQPCrLPnh9GoOXGuItnUwHp0Ystfk1KHoboLbuSvuA==&ch=qf36K5NvSb58CrBhRjYyF_P6KE_N4BcT4igegxbyWD3OsPgGoh-WpA==) an amicus brief in support of the State of Georgia's motion to dismiss the recent suit [filed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Sdcv_MncGpWhsYPCKtR2AI6K7EUUeFOIQkKjbu9IYCxO5ZJlQjl0TlLuQ1jIo_cfF-6XsT4OGE9u1nqVAY2qfUkW9gEbcSrnAOM5NuIj1-5vbo-7JsIBwYN7vhkt3K8aLsEXVKNTQF2eoKBJ1X77cDC9OEk0m0tpiZFvF_n8_vTfHpPTQZeQ7XcsJLHHulqwEddSKc3sIg4hpnPROvzEqPPiuNb-ngb6Hs7jTsV8K0=&c=prrYEQxnp9S3YQPCrLPnh9GoOXGuItnUwHp0Ystfk1KHoboLbuSvuA==&ch=qf36K5NvSb58CrBhRjYyF_P6KE_N4BcT4igegxbyWD3OsPgGoh-WpA==) by the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ). The DOJ's suit against Georgia seeks to overturn the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202), a law that actually [expands](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Sdcv_MncGpWhsYPCKtR2AI6K7EUUeFOIQkKjbu9IYCxO5ZJlQjl0eobPGk16XttRAfrNY8IKf3AcejWA5EnWd3Q33kYFnnX4TbQGA_aTB4kR_q0m5NvJ-P49rDjSINliSF4is_GV4HqO_FcI7_54-GQwzz4OtjtobKKQsbWfmWq3wMLLfkiuWKF5hHYeaBYPvCKDt6vGgpDBZtuSuWJ_G2nbvFu6M8LIqssrbPe4xcFKbDlE3SnKg==&c=prrYEQxnp9S3YQPCrLPnh9GoOXGuItnUwHp0Ystfk1KHoboLbuSvuA==&ch=qf36K5NvSb58CrBhRjYyF_P6KE_N4BcT4igegxbyWD3OsPgGoh-WpA==) ballot access. A federal judge has already [dismissed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Sdcv_MncGpWhsYPCKtR2AI6K7EUUeFOIQkKjbu9IYCxO5ZJlQjl0SQTdNnHWo9ZVV0Y_9aZd90TWDmp45uFGDgrUIapDkZvd2RLhuw9ZgPKipqOuFYuzmlzr3VD8NGyfstvFhrNBHxMY4-U-sF54TyCcybXC8lQh772h9SawhLQH6ZQaIXXcEjZ_6mQphNm1LoceOdOiuUj3LK-zu3Vb3Gerf3n-ULqxeXI15YErMJx_Mxb48V_GWFd10RWnXoZ1aXDcdO3SfKfDoNP5moBIg==&c=prrYEQxnp9S3YQPCrLPnh9GoOXGuItnUwHp0Ystfk1KHoboLbuSvuA==&ch=qf36K5NvSb58CrBhRjYyF_P6KE_N4BcT4igegxbyWD3OsPgGoh-WpA==) a separate lawsuit against the state that was seeking to invalidate parts of S.B. 202.
Greater Georgia's brief [challenges](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Sdcv_MncGpWhsYPCKtR2AI6K7EUUeFOIQkKjbu9IYCxO5ZJlQjl0bc0ZRD-BT9BIkRocvokO5jUn25FuTqaKTnPBkAzFtL10fYMgmsiA5Zzy1Hj9M445d66-IPaHOGdTluowUbPeMGpPC_vcGKHLcy4ENU_G6AlC03Mcjd5dsd5eCVuWDgfGoMNeWLo_gURG-u4BiiSvlHDmmZJr-szZRkGqypaDelEcN-WgyGEinkZr4oGFNgmShN7ydV-ms8TDnVkfALFOQwx36VzJ5BtWg==&c=prrYEQxnp9S3YQPCrLPnh9GoOXGuItnUwHp0Ystfk1KHoboLbuSvuA==&ch=qf36K5NvSb58CrBhRjYyF_P6KE_N4BcT4igegxbyWD3OsPgGoh-WpA==) the merits of the DOJ's case by pointing out the following facts about S.B. 202:

* EXPANDED ACCESS
* Georgia has one of the most open and accessible voting systems in the United States, and the Election Integrity Act actually expands voters' access to the ballot box.

* DROP BOXES
* The Election Integrity Act codifies ballot drop boxes for the first time, creates a uniform system for their implementation, and ensures that they are secure.

* UNIFORMITY
* Changes to elections during the pandemic created widespread confusion, distrust, and poorly implemented changes that lacked uniformity. The Election Integrity Act provides uniformity and transparency in its implementation across all 159 counties.

* ABSENTEE BALLOTS
* The Election Integrity Act strengthens the integrity of absentee ballots by preventing mass mail-outs of absentee ballot requests and prohibiting outside groups from filling out applications for voters.
* It also replaces the subjective signature verification process with the requirement for valid identification.

* OUT-OF-PRECINCT VOTING
* The Election Integrity Act limits the use of provisional ballots for out-of-precinct voters and instead requires these voters be directed to their correct precinct. This process cuts down on excessive provisional ballots, delays, and inaccuracies in election reporting.

To read the full brief, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Sdcv_MncGpWhsYPCKtR2AI6K7EUUeFOIQkKjbu9IYCxO5ZJlQjl0TlLuQ1jIo_cyS0vbEL2CoBfpMjcZ6kzbY2r6oZy8gw9r9e_FgvaGSp5WciOIDQSDQDY0OmqnHQV_qJx6BEJh5pHNQhmR3kQMAn8SQ0AGDViNTjSLRN_EOwYA2nh-QOttKYLIe2aQkkraa7Y1rOFZ6ohUOVmZuIYvAXVmXx_O_fl1QaCVMB2has=&c=prrYEQxnp9S3YQPCrLPnh9GoOXGuItnUwHp0Ystfk1KHoboLbuSvuA==&ch=qf36K5NvSb58CrBhRjYyF_P6KE_N4BcT4igegxbyWD3OsPgGoh-WpA==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | On July 29, Greater Georgia == an amicus brief in support of the State of Georgia's motion to dismiss the recent suit == by the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ). The DOJ's suit against Georgia seeks to overturn the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202), a law that actually == ballot access. A federal judge has already == a separate lawsuit against the state that was seeking to invalidate parts of S.B. 202. Greater Georgia's brief == the merits of the DOJ's case by pointing out the following facts about S.B. 202: EXPANDED ACCESS Georgia has one of the most open and accessible voting systems in the United States, and the Election Integrity Act actually expands voters' access to the ballot box. DROP BOXES The Election Integrity Act codifies ballot drop boxes for the first time, creates a uniform system for their implementation, and ensures that they are secure. UNIFORMITY Changes to elections during the pandemic created widespread confusion, distrust, and poorly implemented changes that lacked uniformity. The Election Integrity Act provides uniformity and transparency in its implementation across all 159 counties. ABSENTEE BALLOTS The Election Integrity Act strengthens the integrity of absentee ballots by preventing mass mail-outs of absentee ballot requests and prohibiting outside groups from filling out applications for voters. It also replaces the subjective signature verification process with the requirement for valid identification. OUT-OF-PRECINCT VOTING * The Election Integrity Act limits the use of provisional ballots for out-of-precinct voters and instead requires these voters be directed to their correct precinct. This process cuts down on excessive provisional ballots, delays, and inaccuracies in election reporting. Kelly Loeffler's voting group, Greater Georgia, is filing a brief Thursday in the Northern District of Georgia calling for a judge to dismiss the Department of Justice's lawsuit against Georgia over [the Election Integrity Act]... '... the Act maintains Georgia's place as a state where it is very easy to vote while addressing recent problems, adding reasonable and uniform safeguards and maintaining no-excuse absentee voting,' the Greater Georgia brief says." name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Taking on the Fat Cats- update from Mississippi's free market think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/fatcatsaturdayemail?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9c714ed2ad&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0169651709&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3acc35a6a8&e=5703353baa)
---
| Dear Friend, As Mississippi’s free market think tank, we aim to shift the climate of opinion in our state in favor of liberty and limited government. It has been a great week towards that goal!

[Our Fat Cat report](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1de259f6ba&e=5703353baa), which exposed the highest-paid public officials across the state, featured on [Fox News](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f708fcb631&e=5703353baa), as well as multiple media outlets across the state, including the [Clarion Ledger](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b919fd6dd5&e=5703353baa) and the Northside Sun. Over 1,500,000 people have watched or listened to news of the report.

In addition, I was able to travel around the state in person to discuss the report, including a trip to Biloxi.
---
|
---
| For as long as anyone can remember, we have been told that poor public services in Mississippi are caused by insufficient funding. Our report overturns that narrative, and reveals that the problem is a chronic lack of public accountability.

**The cozy cartels that have run public education in our state, and often run the school system into the ground, need to be exposed. **

We believe that Mississippi deserves better – and our report takes on the self-serving bureaucracy head on!

Thank you – and have a great weekend!
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=90f2e5454e&e=5703353baa)
---
| Douglas Carswell joined Fox News to discuss the new report and highlight some of its most important findings.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ae9f583b1b&e=5703353baa)
---
| Ben Shapiro's Daily Wire highlighted the findings from our Fat Cat Report in this article.
---
|
---
|
---
| In this Clarion Ledger op-Ed, Douglas Carswell discusses the Fat Cat Report and the potential lessons that can be taken to improve public policy.
---
|
---

Friendーdid you know we’re currently on Day 500...something of ‘15 Days to Slow the Spread?

We have working vaccines, and people are getting back to normal life, but the American economy is still struggling to recover.

Why?

_**Because Biden and Pelosi are still encouraging and paying healthy, able-bodied Americans to stay home.**_

Is that the right moveーDarin LaHood wants to get your take on the situation. _[**Friend, do you think it’s time for America to get back to work?**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d1f3533a43bb44d6802ef9475f5936f7&_e=aRmA1RuYQzq_HOfzXs2IJ4U0GrZjTR9AeZPZAS4TjVuVZTTqzhlOKR2UnVYsXJR17aZoIqIdKDcrgpaobNAxCiBqZwZY59jCPjZ8KEDTIPjGBbK4fCQ-51cx7R8e-FV8ATM6-r0UgdNdzAJpJXgJcxFwIxzYgLJjsAlUUNQVnUWciFvIYTsg4cU5IzGgGOWzfhXLM50vjgm2TsOsQzO5QSLgn72eDj5If_Ykk4cRWnF5pQjOof89z-S1ZTDk7ii2Givi5zsdLJSjkA_kaQf7VijMd_Ub6Mdrernl6afqZuQI7QKO1T8fq37FU9Z9563a5A-9r1jMLesGa24eE00B5PM247W5oJtjr4jMCI2LIrzkH8ipu5IPMWb32abN3rZC2H5mzToYNLTu8Bt2JXgFBcFgWjbcGWVHHkLFga2aPjatOvaEy-JhrhlvWimlitCg3NyIhGvE0QnpHejpfeXEjTqV9cRqUwu55TWD0zqNljM%3D)_

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: re: the weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica and our incredible team are making our way through the western swing of our 100 Counties, 100 Days tour.
#
The weekend is here, and Erica and our incredible team are making our way through the western swing of our _100 Counties, 100 Days_ tour.
Today alone, we’re visiting Polk, Cleveland, and Rutherford counties — connecting with the good people of North Carolina, sharing our progressive vision, and bringing our moral movement statewide.
**Our work to send Erica to the U.S. Senate to fight for bold, urgent change doesn’t stop, not even on the weekends.**
But over the last 24 hours, our online fundraising efforts have slowed down significantly.
We need to call in some support from online supporters to get back on track — and we could really use your help today.
[****Can you support our movement by making a quick donation of $3, $5 or $10 to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate today? Every donation will help keep our digital ads running, put gas in the campaign van, and keep our staff on the campaign trail this weekend.****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8379?refcode=em20210807-324&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=324%2E3698%2EL7EpcI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8379?refcode=em20210807-324&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=324%2E3698%2EL7EpcI)**
Thanks so much!
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210807-324-footer&t=21&refcode2=324_3698_L7EpcI&akid=324%2E3698%2EL7EpcI)**

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: See where America ranks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need Medicare for All now.
#
Peter,
We're LAST in every health care ranking among high-income nations. That means we’re the world's richest nation and spend more per capita on health care compared to our peer nations, yet we’re last in health outcomes across the board.
_You know what all those other nations have in common?_
**That's right: Universal health care. We need Medicare for All.[Chip in $3 to fuel our urgent fight for Medicare for All today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4729?refcode=em20210807-525&t=1&akid=525%2E420207%2E0J2UGQ)**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4729?refcode=em20210807-525&t=2&akid=525%2E420207%2E0J2UGQ)
How bad is it? The United States has the worst mortality rates. Lower life expectancies. Higher costs. More preventable deaths.
This is all avoidable in the richest country in the world. Our private, for-profit health care system is broken.
**Medicare for All is the popular, necessary, and urgent solution to a cruel health care system.** The proposal that I introduced earlier this year ensures everyone has the care they need. That’s health care WITH primary care, vision, dental, prescription drugs, mental health, long-term supports and services, reproductive care, and more. It’s health care WITHOUT copays, private insurance premiums, deductibles, and other out-of-pocket costs.
**Let’s join the rest of the world and guarantee health care for every person in this country.[Can you chip in to make universal health care a reality? Donate to fuel my work to continue leading the Medicare for All movement in Congress, and let’s finally guarantee health care as a human right in America.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4729?refcode=em20210807-525&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=525%2E420207%2E0J2UGQ)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4729?refcode=em20210807-525&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=525%2E420207%2E0J2UGQ)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210807-525-footer&t=23&refcode2=525_420207_0J2UGQ&akid=525%2E420207%2E0J2UGQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Peter,

Over the years, America has lost countless brave soldiers, sailors, airmen, and Marines in the fight for freedom.

Today, we have the opportunity to recognize the service and sacrifice of all those who have died or been wounded in battle.

In honor of Purple Heart Day, I want to show the women and men who have paid the ultimate price to defend our nation how grateful we are. But I’m going to need your help to do that.

**_Peter, I made a thank you card to recognize America’s Purple Heart recipients -[_will you do me a favor and sign it?_](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=2ddb0b0a11284d119efc61a49cf28e0a&_e=RqZpWx4kfr4tOqaTXwADLWnl11EFBsUZQ_vMe10wV5Lh5YW6k0FKuo68gQHhY6uMIkVV8WmVsI5cdMwVIxaC5U8016RLLrkv70Nyrd8w_b-AFlJngs1wp-QAmw4xbXm5FNk-nge-jArqJU-jlUOZhDnoJtYOmZOon-t071iScoehe7hgFJO8FTpEaMvphifh872wJj41LuFUWzDUwLCgzUMU2or2t_TCG8gK3Bc0Dhn6FRmImGmA_XaVFtktLFBHNbjyM2NnCVdD5QtDN9M6fUhLzBgbQF6-7Pztiyt2bodDR4TEhXmfC9wljn5Ag7LW9D7lGjUJRcFIZ_fG1Iwti954WE_tYGU4Y7V6gl8Ym4z7hAbu9C5tkB0ygqhxh9cS_Qn8RLiyOCcKzs59ohSOgKVt7yn-cJKAGh9fQoUjrctJ1d6Q7uPeItT64CePX3t-S2kOs7Y0WOKa7vnzqL3_6h4N6PViicTJlJRcN5OCgS_j-XIti64jyi8P8t1Uz_Vw)_**

[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=2ddb0b0a11284d119efc61a49cf28e0a&_e=RqZpWx4kfr4tOqaTXwADLWnl11EFBsUZQ_vMe10wV5Lh5YW6k0FKuo68gQHhY6uMIkVV8WmVsI5cdMwVIxaC5U8016RLLrkv70Nyrd8w_b-AFlJngs1wp-QAmw4xbXm5FNk-nge-jArqJU-jlUOZhDnoJtYOmZOon-t071iScoehe7hgFJO8FTpEaMvphifh872wJj41LuFUWzDUwLCgzUMU2or2t_TCG8gK3Bc0Dhn6FRmImGmA_XaVFtktLFBHNbjyM2NnCVdD5QtDN9M6fUhLzBgbQF6-7Pztiyt2bofEi12cXu-qNkVbaNMzQl6S_xCu-_cdGgxtu22cRpl6yH-zjDTGhm-rUEGKBrCg9LaZl934oxbafo2IQlzue0LjfYc0QGVM7NkXy0sFEK1uYlY_VGYAnOzsRwEqyLvgOZawdmfBS8wMzjpLXDLDPqxjkp0U9XyUkwoaXsJWcmtjzd8ThMmmAAtexK4BVVmuDkE05JC4gAW641TA4cXJjLUe)

Our Purple Heart recipients have gone above and beyond the call of duty. Their sacrifices secured our freedoms, and we owe them everything.

Let’s show them some appreciation today.

[_**Click here to sign the thank you card to honor America’s best and bravest. >>>**_](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=2ddb0b0a11284d119efc61a49cf28e0a&_e=RqZpWx4kfr4tOqaTXwADLWnl11EFBsUZQ_vMe10wV5Lh5YW6k0FKuo68gQHhY6uMIkVV8WmVsI5cdMwVIxaC5U8016RLLrkv70Nyrd8w_b-AFlJngs1wp-QAmw4xbXm5FNk-nge-jArqJU-jlUOZhDnoJtYOmZOon-t071iScoehe7hgFJO8FTpEaMvphifh872wJj41LuFUWzDUwLCgzUMU2or2t_TCG8gK3Bc0Dhn6FRmImGmA_XaVFtktLFBHNbjyM2NnCVdD5QtDN9M6fUhLzBgbQF6-7Pztiyt2bof-Npk81yXUYIZt7XZ0NuMcJiTwIhHu3axbxKaBkuzjAHTg0_yEZ_JKoMTL6wm_ovsbY_cOuKgRKj_pQSzy4VBH5wBxhiTrEnGp9eh3HbegQrwEwJhDFBtcoum_3g0MXViyDPweXbIbQ92Q0JTDXGxCVux6WbCfV3nPQE-sey5Z6cZjEwDf0AW7weHELwyuodIWeZFndsQBEZTrZB6PyFIk)

name: Josh Harder
subject: you pay a higher tax rate than Jeff Bezos
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kjcDwm5Dxiie-Eoc0uKFaswdMq0onnI_yyk12MvojSo=/fdzBXSkavGpbNjUpJbUwZFuMk5LtaJ6zxysT6DgHJ1M=) | Peter: While billionaires make space their new playground, working families back on earth are struggling to make ends meet -- and we know why: From 2014 to 2018, 25 of the wealthiest Americans paid a true tax rate of just 3.4%. Compare that to the average American household paying 14% in federal taxes. Billionaires have learned how to game the system, and as a result, people like Jeff Bezos nearly _doubled_ their net worth during the coronavirus pandemic, while millions of American workers -- including folks right here in the Valley -- lost their jobs and fell into poverty. **[Enough is enough: It's time for billionaires to pay their fair share in taxes. If you agree, add your name to my petition now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/kjcDwm5Dxiie-Eoc0uKFaswdMq0onnI_yyk12MvojSo=/fdzBXSkavGpbNjUpJbUwZFuMk5LtaJ6zxysT6DgHJ1M=)** | [TAX THE BILLIONAIRES](https://act.myngp.com/el/kjcDwm5Dxiie-Eoc0uKFaswdMq0onnI_yyk12MvojSo=/fdzBXSkavGpbNjUpJbUwZFuMk5LtaJ6zxysT6DgHJ1M=)
---
For too long, corporate billionaires and special interests have lobbied for tax cuts and financial loopholes in exchange for huge campaign contributions. As a result, they've had Washington politicians eating out of the palm of their hands while everyday people are left to shoulder an unfair tax burden.
In the time that it took you to read the first half of this email, Jeff Bezos literally made hundreds of thousands of dollars. But YOU likely pay a higher tax rate than he does!
**I 'm not afraid of corporate billionaires, which is why I'm demanding that they pay their fair share in taxes. Now.** **[If you're with me, add your name to my petition here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/kjcDwm5Dxiie-Eoc0uKFaswdMq0onnI_yyk12MvojSo=/fdzBXSkavGpbNjUpJbUwZFuMk5LtaJ6zxysT6DgHJ1M=)**
Thank you,
Josh Harder

Hey there, I’ve got bad news. Mitch McConnell has made Maggie Hassan his number one target. His super PAC allies have spent _millions_ on attack ads -- and they’re working. **A new poll shows Maggie DOWN by one point.** I don’t want to sound the alarms, but our August fundraising is off to a slow start. body:
he’s too chicken to say what he really thinks
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33689581/299652169/-2023814932?refcode=20210807.5_TM_8X&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGFlYjFiNy1jOGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Orke-AEvEpG_FZQ7yGvnkd8OOYWjRFaUCp9nrFW0ck4=)

| | Glenn Youngkin dropped out of another debate, Derek. **As a result, Virginia’s only statewide-broadcast Governor’s debate will be _cancelled._**

This is bad for all Virginians. The AARP Virginia State Director said Youngkin’s move was **“a missed opportunity for voters.”**

Derek, we know why Youngkin is hiding.

He knows that if voters hear his extreme right-wing views and support for Donald Trump, they’ll never vote for him.

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Reproductive rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The Supreme Court announced earlier this year that they will review Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban. Now, 228 Republican members of Congress are calling on the Supreme Court to overturn the landmark Roe v. Wade decision. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33689932/299653442/1723502593?gpsid=8_30_20065&ms=em21_210807_roe_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_210807_roe_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210807_roe_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzUzNTdjZS1jYWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AebU80jgr5uLu-rQm5ms84mfPzpVpO_QaBvAHozjwsE=&emci=a13ee4f8-c4f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=135357ce-caf7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338) Reproductive rights are under attack, Peter.

The Supreme Court announced earlier this year that they will review Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban. **Now, 228 Republican members of Congress are calling on the Supreme Court to overturn the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision.**

With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Supreme Court, Republicans think this case is the opportunity they've been waiting for to roll back the rights established by _Roe_. If they get their way, access to reproductive health care for millions of Americans will be at risk.

**[We can't let Republicans get away with their attacks on our reproductive rights. Now, 228 Republican members of Congress are calling on the Supreme Court to overturn the landmark Roe v. Wade decision. Reproductive rights are under attack, Peter. Peter, I am committed to being your advocate for reproductive justice.

Throughout my career serving Virginians in the House of Delegates, I’ve fought to protect and advance reproductive care -- from birth control and contraception access to abortion.

That’s why I’m proud to be endorsed by EMILY's List, NARAL, and Planned Parenthood!

**But I’m up against one of the most anti-choice politicians in Virginia.**

_Republican Winsome Sears has made it clear:_ Her #1 priority is to defund essential services like Planned Parenthood, and prevent a person from choosing what’s best for their own body.

I’m disgusted by this rhetoric. No politician should ever be involved in personal health care decisions.

Abortion care is health care. Reproductive rights must be protected. These are fundamental rights.

[**So I’m asking for your support, Peter. I cannot begin to fathom the undoing of progress on reproductive rights if my opponent wins this race -- I won’t allow our rights to crumble. subject: Dems say “safety for me, but not for thee”
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ef5597f8a8f6/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4947814?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Have you seen this latest video of a radical democrat calling for defunding the police AFTER saying she deserves security - **[it's insane you need to watch it](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=f968e669d5&e=13f35c4add)[.](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=63585034a0&e=13f35c4add)**
---
| This is what the left has become - **they actually think only they deserve safety and security, and could care less about you and your family. ** This kind of rhetoric is dangerous, and it's contributing to the spikes in violent crime around our nation and the record low numbers of new police applicants.

We cannot let this go on any longer. I am proud to stand with our police and fight against radical socialists trying to defund them every day, and I know you do too. **[> >> Let’s send a clear and loud message NOW. Can you rush $10, $20, or $30 RIGHT NOW to help make our support for our brave officers known? <<<](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=8d273d5a5e&e=13f35c4add)**
---
| [$10.00](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=76a1b8f057&e=13f35c4add "$10.00")
---
| [$20.00](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=89653b9203&e=13f35c4add "$20.00")
---
| [$30.00](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=9670d5984f&e=13f35c4add "$30.00")
---
| This only works if we stand united with our men and women in blue against the socialists trying to make our nation less safe.
**I’ll keep fighting for us and our future.**
Best,

Chris Jacobs

| | Belknap County Republicans are excited to invite you to join them for their annual FUNdraiser Gala at our pristine county owned Gunstock Mountain Resort, **Saturday, August 21st**. Thanks to the help of Matt Mowers, our Special Guest speaker will be Florida's **Senator Rick Scott**. The schedule for the evening is listed below. You will also enjoy great food, music, dancing, live auction and a silent auction. This event allows guests to enjoy the entire Gunstock lodge facility with the meal and activities happening in the main lodge and guests can step outside to the beautiful patio for a spectacular sunset. We hope you will attend this summer evening of fun with some of NH's great Patriots! All proceeds from our annual fundraiser are used to help elect Republican candidates.

**Gala Menu:** salad, grilled steak tips, baked haddock, veggies, roasted potatoes and dessert

**Tickets:** $65.00 each

**Sponsorships: **( all levels will be advertised at our event )
The Belknap - $2500.00 (includes 10 free tickets, Reserved seating )
The Gunstock - $1,000.00 ( includes 6 free tickets, Reserved seating )
The Piper - $500.00 ( included 4 free tickets )
The Mount Major - $250.00 ( includes 2 free tickets )

*****
Tickets and Sponsorships can be purchased online at the link below

[https://www.eventcreate.com/e/bcrccountrygala](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feventcreate.us6.list-manage.com%2Ftrack%2Fclick%3Fu=6a3ee64bc871f6fe53aba57dc%26id=86ff442ad6%26e=020e4890ce/1/0100017b21ff8fdf-ce0f5cd9-089e-4af5-a263-0cf182d9bdef-000000/nGOLLWCGx0_HbRi5SG02H_giNLI=230)

If you have any questions about the event or sponsorships please contact Beth Varney at 603-765-6382.

*****
The LIVE Auction will include a 9mm handgun and a hat signed by President Trump

The Silent Auction will include items signed by Lt General Michael Flynn, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, several additional signed books from prominent Republicans including Don Jr, Diamond & Silk, Congressman Steve Scalise, Newt Gingrich and more...

We will also be raffling off one of President Trump's autographed books.

*****
**Schedule**

**5 p.m.**
**People arriving / Cocktails / Games / Silent auction begins**

**5:38 p.m.**
**Guest Speaker is introduced**

**5:40 p.m.**
**Remarks from Senator Scott**

**6 p.m.**
**Dinner Bell! Prayer and Blessing by Pastor Sam**
**Gala Menu : salad, grilled steak tips, baked haddock, veggies, roasted potatoes and dessert**

**7:00 p.m.**
**Live Auction / reminder silent auction to end at 9 p.m.**

**8 p.m. ~ 10 p.m.**
**Dancing begins **

**9 p.m.**
**Silent auction ends / winners announced**

*****
Senator Rick Scott is chairman of the National Senatorial Committee, serves on the Armed Services Committee, Commerce Science and Transportation, Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs, Budget Committee and on the Seniors and Aging Committee

*****
**Event Location:**
**Gunstock Mountain Resort** **(Main Lodge)**
**719 Cherry Valley Rd**
**Gilford, NH**

“All solicitations of funds in connection with this event are by the Belknap County Republicans and not by Senator Scott.”
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Cox=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Weekly Beast: Debate Recap + New Tax Cut Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
Momentum for John Cox continued to build this week with Wednesday’s gubernatorial debate. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/8jt85jsn9d-4961186?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=58dd328597&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=b1f7ef5854&e=b8a6795190)
---
### Cox Shines at Debate + Releases New Tax Plan
Momentum for John Cox continued to build this week with Wednesday’s gubernatorial debate. Among the three other GOP candidates who attended,**John stood out as the only outsider with his straight talk and common-sense solutions for California**. From homelessness to education to public safety to making California more affordable, John Cox presented the ideas that will fix the state.“Sacramento is all about politicians who talk, talk, talk and don’t do anything,” John said. “I’m a businessman who has been in business for forty years. When I don’t solve problems, I’m out of business.”[**Watch the recording**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d25bca7121&e=b8a6795190)**of Wednesday’s California Recall Debate.**
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1227dcd505&e=b8a6795190)
### Cox Shares Plan for the Largest Tax Cut in CA History
“I will implement the largest tax cut in CA history: **$30 Billion**. **That’s more than double any other proposal** ,” John said in a Twitter statement this week, while touring the state to share his new tax plan. “It’s a 25% cut across the board cut. It will put $30 Billion back into the hands of Californians. After all, it’s their money, not the government’s.”
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e04eff44d0&e=b8a6795190)
**John’s tax cut plan has four major components to make California competitive and affordable again.**
1. **Slashing Income Taxes** It’s a 25 percent across the board tax cut that will go to families and small businesses. It will permanently put $30 Billion back into the hands of Californians.
2. **Closing Corporate Loopholes** Corporate loopholes in California are sometimes big and obvious and sometimes they are smaller and barely noticed, but they all add up. John Cox will eliminate them.
3. **Eliminate Wasteful Spending** Hundreds of millions and even billions of dollars could be saved by rooting out waste, fraud and abuse from California government. He’ll increase transparency and audit state agencies.
4. **Zero Based Budgeting** Create a budget starting at zero and figure out how much money you need to succeed. Instead, government takes the previous year’s budget and uses that as a baseline for the next budget.

| [Read John’s Tax Cut Plan](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=66f0a42485&e=b8a6795190)
---
### The Beastly Solutions Bus Tour Rolls On
John began his **third statewide bus tour this week** , making stops in Sacramento, Fresno, and Bakersfield. The tour will make seven stops, in seven California cities across the next two weeks. On Thursday, John kicked off his tax cut tour at California’s State Capitol building, presenting his tax cut plan and showcasing another demonstrative aid - a giant “Gavinopoly” board. The “Gavinopoly” board**** was designed to highlight the high taxes and wasteful spending in Gavin Newsom’s California. **California is home to one of the highest income taxes in the country and one of the highest cost-of-livings.** They are driving families and businesses out of the state.Californians have been living “Gavinopoly”, and like the beloved board game, it’s gone on for way too long. **Gavin Newsom treats Californians like they are pawns in his game** , raising taxes and making life harder for the people of this state. It’s time to shake up Sacramento.
### Your Support Means So Much
People are more energized by the recall election than ever, and Gavin Newsom is getting worried. He’s been calling on his liberal cronies in a desperate attempt to deflect from his failures. But Californians can see through the insiders’ tactics - after all, the issues facing this state affect everyone, shown by the bipartisan push to get Gavin Newsom recalled. **Thank you to those who came out to show your support earlier this week at the fundraiser.** Your financial contributions make a difference and will help us cross the finish line stronger than ever!
| [Contribute Now & Recall Newsom](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8cfc713070&e=b8a6795190)
---
| [Follow the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8263f711aa&e=b8a6795190)
---
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=45cd068822&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8e1cf507eb&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=948286c297&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1a40d03ac8&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=db275456d8&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
### [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=375cb2f5e4&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc. FPPC ID #14377013525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
[Add us to your address book](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256) [Update Preferences](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=1d631bc7a4) | [Unsubscribe](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=1d631bc7a4)
---

name: Collier for Texas
subject: Nothing about fixing the damn grid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Here we go again, friend. **Governor Greg Abbott announced that the Texas legislature reconvenes for another special session starting today. And, once again, not a word about fixing the damn grid.** Last month, Texas Democrats had the courage to block efforts to strip thousands of Texans of their sacred right to vote by breaking quorum and traveling to D.C., demanding desperately needed federal action on voting rights. Governor Abbott and Lt. Governor Patrick are working day-and-night to make sure Texans cannot hold them accountable for their repeated failures. And with record temperatures, flooding, and heatwaves getting worse each year, it’s simply unacceptable that fixing the damn grid is _still_ not on the agenda. Folks, by refusing to fix the grid from another disaster, our leadership is failing Texans and enabling another disastrous power outage in the future. It’s past time we elect a problem-solver who will address these issues head-on, so we’re asking: **We are running out of time to fix our rickety power grid. Will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can afford to hold our leadership accountable during this session and demand action on the power grid crisis?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33692267/299658876/-1794748404?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=mc-em210807-specialsession&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTUyZmMzMi1kOWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CH0BFCfn184_MeYl4nPn55D76-QF_SjC7nRBQV694pU=)

clean_body: | Here we go again, friend. Governor Greg Abbott announced that the Texas legislature reconvenes for another special session starting today. And, once again, not a word about fixing the damn grid. Last month, Texas Democrats had the courage to block efforts to strip thousands of Texans of their sacred right to vote by breaking quorum and traveling to D.C., demanding desperately needed federal action on voting rights. Governor Abbott and Lt. Governor Patrick are working day-and-night to make sure Texans cannot hold them accountable for their repeated failures. And with record temperatures, flooding, and heatwaves getting worse each year, it’s simply unacceptable that fixing the damn grid is still not on the agenda. Folks, by refusing to fix the grid from another disaster, our leadership is failing Texans and enabling another disastrous power outage in the future. It’s past time we elect a problem-solver who will address these issues head-on, so we’re asking: We are running out of time to fix our rickety power grid. Will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can afford to hold our leadership accountable during this session and demand action on the power grid crisis? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = While Gov. Abbott and Dan Patrick would rather bring our state backward by focusing on culture wars, Mike is ready to invest in our state’s infrastructure, improve countless lives, and move Texas forward into the 21st century. Thanks again, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Walt Blackman | Combat Vet
subject: they want to leave us defenseless...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)
|
---
Hi Peter - I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

I'm reaching out because I wanted to see if you happened to catch this exchange on _CBS_ with member of the socialist Squad, Cori Bush?

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)

**[Check out this INSANE VIDEO of Cori Bush NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)**

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)
[**WATCH THIS RADICAL HYPOCRISY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)
It's astonishing that in the same breath, Cori Bush is defending her spending on private security while advocating to defund the police across the country.

**Even worse, she advocates for strict gun control measures that would leave law-abiding citizens in her district completely defenseless against criminals. **

That reminds me of what corrupt 3rd-world leaders do: hire their own private security to protect themselves and force the people to live in lawless anarchy.

Peter, we can't allow these radicals to force this dangerous agenda on the American people, especially since they will never suffer the consequences.

**[That 's why I'm asking you to help send me to congress to DEFEAT 'Defund the Police' radicals like Cori Bush >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)
Peter, the most disturbing thing about this entire effort is that radicals like Cori Bush and the Minneapolis City Council understand that by defunding the police, **_more people in their cities will become victims_ ,** _**they embolden the criminals**_ , and _**more people are likely to be killed****. **_

**But they don 't care. **

That's why they walk around with private security and force their constituents to suffer the consequences.

**[Peter, we must defeat this dangerous hypocrisy from the Left, and I 'm calling on your support now to do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story?_

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag! **

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link: [https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2692980](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58094314:JJ29_el1N:m:1:3253819041:71B798EBA1FE9724061AADCF0691FC47:r)

I'm reaching out because I wanted to see if you happened to catch this exchange on CBS with member of the socialist Squad, Cori Bush? ⬇⬇⬇ It's astonishing that in the same breath, Cori Bush is defending her spending on private security while advocating to defund the police across the country. Even worse, she advocates for strict gun control measures that would leave law-abiding citizens in her district completely defenseless against criminals. That reminds me of what corrupt 3rd-world leaders do: hire their own private security to protect themselves and force the people to live in lawless anarchy. Peter, we can't allow these radicals to force this dangerous agenda on the American people, especially since they will never suffer the consequences. Peter, the most disturbing thing about this entire effort is that radicals like Cori Bush and the Minneapolis City Council understand that by defunding the police, more people in their cities will become victims , they embolden the criminals , and more people are likely to be killed. But they don 't care. That's why they walk around with private security and force their constituents to suffer the consequences. Want to hear the rest of my story? I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War. My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is. You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets. We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background. We believe in Freedom. We don 't believe in burning down monuments... We don 't believe in burning our flag... We stand up for our flag! And we stand up for the United States of America! I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it. I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link: Thank you, Walt Blackman | | | Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress | | | | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. * __During the 2020 election, Donald Trump and his right-wing allies spread lies about the voting process and started bogus lawsuits to discourage participation in the election --_showing they’ll stop at nothing to win._

* Steve stood up against Republicans and passed voting rights, public health insurance, workers' protections, and boosted funding for education. _But we’re at risk of losing it all._

* Steve already has **4 Republican opponents****** and _more are likely to enter the race._

clean_body: [internal memo] | | | | | Hi team, Rebecca here. I’m about to, but first I want to discuss the landscape of the Nevada 2022 Gubernatorial Race. As a longtime political strategist in Nevada politics, I can assure you that this race will be one of the most competitive in decades. Here’s why: In 2018, Republicans spent** millionsof dollars attacking Steve \-- and we’re certain they plan on doing it again this time around. During the 2020 election, Donald Trump and his right-wing allies spread lies about the voting process and started bogus lawsuits to discourage participation in the election --showing they’ll stop at nothing to win. Steve stood up against Republicans and passed voting rights, public health insurance, workers' protections, and boosted funding for education. But we’re at risk of losing it all. Steve already has 4 Republican opponents**** and more are likely to enter the race. Folks, we’ve got a long road ahead of us, which is why we need your help: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Steve’s Republican opponents rely on the GOP warchest to fund their campaigns, while Steve’s campaign is fueled through grassroots donations from supporters like you. Your contribution makes it possible for us to power our year-round organizing efforts and protect the progress we’ve made from national, right-wing organizations who want to flip Nevada from blue to red. Your support will make or break how well Steve does in the upcoming election. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for powering this movement, Rebecca Lambe | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89101 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

**\-- TOMORROW:** We'll be forced to slash the budget of our political operations unless more Patriots step up
I don't like asking you for money. I know you get a lot of emails. But winning these last remaining special elections _\-- and other key races --_ is our golden ticket to winning back the House Majority and firing Pelosi.
[**As of this morning, we still needed 190 more American Patriots to chip in ten bucks before tonight.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e74845e0f97042dfb5092becee966a1b&_e=erjvA81cGaI5L_KQuq7HXaiS_aLJ-_cy-uzWMgLtFyUn6UjdCAM6_-Le2NFsnl8N1L0QCs2TiQPN7LTbIj2pPAR4MmiOnW5JhDTShh88mDBttaR2Lk9fufIaI11qd0N1W64jVthI8aJMaqFj7uVxDYRn1KN4NuLqL_PDYa9e_5CUjEUtHWDiCTsG9NT06XnOoATwbRd0QuOxOIHeksXN4eq3PUKrGJvlrjU3CPNDNREmBXyEgh6RmOlO2azOPZ01faKgc2uXmdor2k1BArjXHkheio5SSRmkDiD8-7ZK59eWgR1ECNI8I9iQWG0Wl9apyYyTIml4HYI4AtcpuBzS5iPzgSi4c2i8WvX-xrJB8vIm_7BATesoPZToy2T3ynS7nhGZZiuFU0r7khuE3NXJzYsWsJQktR-pWzJ_rZIDChp8lSaEceD-sKP07P8Nn0wacve7ZSoUNxh1Zj3xcLQyTN5TizIei4vYUHnZkiSP9uCJy7rmirQvnyXsNPxLriXGG_ai-FelQ8DH_JLGxD6DKCtAtvAZ0nUXeSNxYGSjIlA%3D)

body:
| | | [SIGN NOW: Add your name to CONDEMN Republicans for opposing the January 6 investigation >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We want you to see this right away:
[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**A brand new poll just revealed more than 6O% of Americans support the Congressional investigation of the January 6 insurrection.**

But that hasn't stopped Republicans from ruthlessly OPPOSING efforts at every turn:

**FIRST:**

Trump's Republicans REJECTED plans for a bipartisan commission.

**THEN:**

The top House Republican tried to PREVENT the subsequent investigation by naming top Trump loyalists to the January 6 committee.

**SO NOW:**

**[We must do everything we can to uncover the truth about that day and hold its perpetrators accountable.](https://links.e.dccc.)**

But Republicans are going to fight us at every turn -- _and with Trump still pulling the strings at Republican HQ, our Democrats need to know Americans everywhere are behind them._

**That 's why we're calling on 15,OOO grassroots Democrats to stand up and CONDEMN Republicans for opposing the January 6 investigation. Can we count on you to represent your area in our poll before midnight?**

---
[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Add your name to CONDEMN Republicans for opposing the January 6 investigation >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)
---

Thanks,

DCCC

body:
You may have heard the rumors, but today I wanted to let you know it’s CONFIRMED. President Trump will be hosting a rally in Cullman, Alabama on Saturday, August 21st and you’re invited!

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: We have so much to talk about, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | | We have so much to talk about Friend,

Just this past week we found out that my radical Democrat opponent not only outraised me last quarter but was also one of the TOP THREE fundraisers for Democrats.

_**Here 's what that means:**_

❌ Democrats are confident they can flip Florida blue
❌ The radical left KNOWS that the key for control of the Senate runs through Florida
❌ Attacks against me have started and are only going to keep piling on
❌ Leftist Dark money groups will expand their programs to funnel money into Florida

_**But here 's what I know:**_

✅ I have a solid group of grassroots supporters that always have my back
✅ Conservatives won't take this fight laying down
✅ The top patriots are HIGHLY engaged in this battle, nothing will take them by surprise
✅ My team and I are confident we can WIN if we don't give up

You read that right, Friend, **your support and level of engagement will make ALL THE DIFFERENCE in whether I win or lose.** So I'm asking you, **[will you join me in this fight to keep Florida red and help me preserve everything we've accomplished these past four years?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ea71e19d63c14be287c9f601bdf0fa94&_e=WAbjIre761ymaLmfd3TgUcDsIoNDeLkdljPdz_pm91Kbr8JfvlcWJ6BYJIfL7b0CGUYjBLzgkcUqSOIGJfc_orDKOQuYOKIqZgbASTyxodh0G2XfjV7RpMxUWBpeyOMQg6vkxpJcMpQW4wo3FKMTY6Ptd2D3l6mbNYaF0EHf7k5QbpoeUIjQStuZCoTtWU6fyOy4BDGBDTdCR_FftbL0kCXcX1cXskR24Lzj72w2LVF7wBjes8-sqAhglNsqLZWrQcKS5eu9WffAIZJLHMBRdV7PdWNMIFo2iTt8_SYd3dXqZrHt00SVssXarPZGnCwX5HxMo9tXfDEYdo-9bcfS-Z9-3sYGnREhz-4_WGUiR7oHOqz_IcfWlRDW_sg-HN5ikPjxeCMUm_Hov4DpyT7WH7Ai7kjTfABzqBMQlLCqaW-NYDfpeUDePWzKiPjatp5GwTLZ9aCyVJnlQLlU8LzfF-I6tQLR2iNbdviVxnY611o7yu0DecE0lSDn0fTkK7dytK9-wqPrEqmJh7fI1gs5bvlqZpXcrO42c5B_kDigWZk%3D "will you join me in this fight to keep Florida red and help me preserve everything we’ve accomplished these past four years?")**

Donald J. Trump August 7th, 2021
Joe Biden's infrastructure bill is a disgrace. If Mitch McConnell was smart, which we've seen no evidence of, he would use the debt ceiling card to negotiate a good infrastructure package.
This is a 2,700 page bill that no one could have possibly read--they would have needed to take speed reading courses. It is a gift to the Democrat Party, compliments of Mitch McConnell and some RINOs, who have no idea what they are doing. There is very little on infrastructure in all of those pages. Instead, they track your driving so they can tax you. It is Joe Biden's form of a gas tax but far bigger, far higher and, mark my words, far worse. They want to track you everywhere you go and watch everything you do!
Joe Biden's infrastructure bill will be used against the Republican Party in the upcoming elections in 2022 and 2024. It will be very hard for me to endorse anyone foolish enough to vote in favor of this deal.
The good news is that the progressive wing in the Democrat Party will lose all credibility with this approval. Additionally, Kevin McCarthy and Republican House members seem to be against the bill. If it can't be killed in the Senate, maybe it dies in the House!
Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats understand that this is the way to get the horrendous $3.5 trillion, actually $5 trillion, Green New Deal bill done in the House. Mitch is playing right into Nancy's hands, not to mention the fact Chuck Schumer is already going around saying this is a big victory for the Democrats. Whether it's the House or the Senate, think twice before you approve this terrible deal. Republicans should wait until after the Midterms when they will gain all the strength they'll need to make a good deal, but remember, you already have the card, it's called the debt ceiling, which the Democrats threatened us with constantly.
